reviews_list.review_title: Nursing is the future of medicine.

review_content.Placements: About 60 students are in each class, and the placement rate of students is very good, ranging from 80% to 95%. The top recruiters among them are government medical colleges and hospitals, offering good packages with an annual salary of 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, but the hostel facility is only for girls; boys have to rent accommodation in the neighboring area. The quality of the girls' mess in the hostel is acceptable in terms of hygiene but not so good in taste. Currently, Wi-Fi is not available.

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well-maintained and conducive to fostering an environment for students to study, but there are no dedicated playgrounds for sports as the campus area is not so large. However, the educational buildings are well-equipped for student study. Currently, Wi-Fi facility is not available.

individual_reviews.title: JLNMCH BHAGALPUR: College with pros and cons.

content.Placements: It's an MBBS college so getting a job totally depends on students performance in different entrance and competition exams like NEET PG and IICET. Just this year, a student from our college secured AIR 250 IN NEET PG. The paid internship of 1 year is provided in the college hospital itself after final year university results.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel are quite old. The facilities are good. We get beds, almirahs, tables, chairs, fans, etc. in the girls hostel. Boys hostel has fewer facilities. The game courts are there in boys hostel. There is a study room too. Mess is private so it totally depends on which Mess service you choose.

individual_reviews.course: General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college to get a good future in the medical field .

content.Placements: The number of students enrolled here is quite good, and the placement rates for students are fair enough, like any other college with a good course, as most of the students get there placement in government colleges and in good private hospitals with good packages .
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not quite good enough but the classrooms are spacious enough for study, and some labs are equipped with AC facilities for students but there is a lack of dedicated sports fields on campus. Hostels are provided to girls, not boys, who have to find their own accommodation in neighbouring parts .

The average package offered here is around 12-14 LPA, and in most prestigious medical colleges and hospitals like AIIMS and Medanta, the top role that you can expect is that of a nursing officer and, at the rural level, a community health officer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well-maintained and conducive to fostering an environment for students to study, but there are no dedicated playgrounds for sports as the campus area is not so large. However, the educational buildings are well-equipped for student study. Currently, Wi-Fi facility is not available.

content.Placements: The placement rate is average after completing the course. The highest package you could expect from here is about 6-8 LPA, which is a decent amount. Government medical colleges are the main recruiters from this course. Top roles you could expect during placement are nursing officer positions.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good enough for an educational environment, and it is nearby a medical hospital, which helps a lot during clinical duties. Currently, the Wi-Fi facility is not fully fledged in parts of the hostel but will be enabled soon. The girls' hostel has its own mess in the hostel building, so there is no hurry to get food.

description: Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Bhagalpur cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Bhagalpur NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 15293 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Bhagalpur MBBS cutoff 2025 was 15293 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 15741 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Bhagalpur accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Bhagalpur NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 15018 to 66479. According to this range, the most and least competitive courses are MS and MD, respectively. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Bhagalpur MS cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MS in General Surgery. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 15018.

reviews.review_heading: JLNMCH BHAGALPUR: College with pros and cons.
reviews.review_text: The hostel are quite old. The facilities are good. We get beds, almirahs, tables, chairs, fans, etc. in the girls hostel. Boys hostel has fewer facilities. The game courts are there in boys hostel. There is a study room too. Mess is private so it totally depends on which Mess service you choose.

reviews.review_heading: Good college to get a good future in the medical field .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not quite good enough but the classrooms are spacious enough for study, and some labs are equipped with AC facilities for students but there is a lack of dedicated sports fields on campus. Hostels are provided to girls, not boys, who have to find their own accommodation in neighbouring parts .

reviews.review_heading: Nursing is the future of medicine.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but the hostel facility is only for girls; boys have to rent accommodation in the neighboring area. The quality of the girls' mess in the hostel is acceptable in terms of hygiene but not so good in taste. Currently, Wi-Fi is not available.

reviews.review_heading: Upskill yourself with new techniques.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well-maintained and conducive to fostering an environment for students to study, but there are no dedicated playgrounds for sports as the campus area is not so large. However, the educational buildings are well-equipped for student study. Currently, Wi-Fi facility is not available.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for gaining experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good enough for an educational environment, and it is nearby a medical hospital, which helps a lot during clinical duties. Currently, the Wi-Fi facility is not fully fledged in parts of the hostel but will be enabled soon. The girls' hostel has its own mess in the hostel building, so there is no hurry to get food.

reviews.review_heading: A good college to gain knowledge in the field of nursing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of colleges is not so good, but hospital infrastructure is well-equipped and maintained. One can gain a lot of knowledge and practice from this environment. Libraries are present, but there is a shortage of books. Wi-fi is not available. The canteen is present with decent-type food.

reviews.review_heading: Best college of nursing in Bihar.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are so good in our campus. There is a well-equipped labs, library and classroom. The infrastructure of our campus was not so good because the building was soo old. The qualities of the facilities in our hostel are also soo good. There is a separate hostel for girls. The food qualitu was just acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: No 1college gor bursing course.
reviews.review_text: If we talk about the facilities in our campus for GNM course is so good. The infrastructure are also good for medical college but the I infrastructure of training hospital was not so good. The building was so old. There was also a good facility of girls Hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for nursing .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was just average. The building was so old. But the facilities are available in our college. There is a well-equipped labs and classroom for student. The qualities of hostel facilities are also good but the quality of food was not so good.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for Nursing in Bihar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college are not so good. But the facilities are available. Our classroom are well-equipped with Wi-Fi, etc. There is also a good facility of library. The quality of facilities of Hostel are not so good it was just acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: Great college for Nursing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not so good, but all the facilities are available in our college. There are well-equipped classrooms, labs, library, etc. The quality of facilities in our hostel is not so good. It is just acceptable. The quality of food in mess is also not good.

reviews.review_heading: Great college for nursing.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of medical college is so good but the infrastructure of hospital is not so good. The faculty of our course are so well educated and helpful in nature. There is also facility of hostel for girls. The quality of food is just acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college for nursing, and our teachers are so cooperative.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure. Our classrooms are not good. Mess and canteen facilities are available. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Bhagalpur.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Air-conditioners and projectors are available in classrooms. Labs are good and well-equipped. Hostels are good. You can get a single room or a shared room.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good PG selection ratio, an average hostel, and a good campus life.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are provided in the 2nd year or after the first half of the 1st year. Hostels are not new, as this college is too old in 1959. However, now new hostels are being constructed quickly and heavily. One thing that everyone is going to appreciate is the mess food. Normal rice, bread, daal, and seasonal vegetables are available at affordable prices.

reviews_list.review_title: Good patients flow and can acquire good skills .

review_content.Placements: 100 students are studying in our batch. An internship is compulsory for a year in the same college. Salary will be provided by the institution. The lowest package received is 10000, and the highest is in Lacs. Many of the students who studied here got AIR top marks.

reviews_list.review_title: Tamil Nadu Government Dental College And Hospital, Chennai.

review_content.Placements: Medinetix Healthcare Pvt Ltd, Focus Dental care, and Smile Care dental clinics are a few of the private organisations that recruit graduates of MS from our college with negotiated pay that mostly range between 3.7 to 4.6 LPA as an average pay. They also provide intern opportunities for freshers.
review_content.Infrastructure: Small setups for clinics in treating dental-oriented problems are built in the college to show a live experience of treatment to the students. Gender based and other forms of discrimination are not encouraged by the college, instead, they provide priority to the students who are much more curious to learn.

individual_reviews.title: It is India's premier dental institution offers hands-on learning with a high patient flow.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Pharmacy is a beneficial course in the budget.

content.Placements: I am currently studying at the HIMT College of Pharmacy, and my course is B.Pharma. The highest package offered by the college is 5 LPA, and the lowest is approximately 2.7 LPA. Top recruiting companies for my course are Alembic Limited, Ranbaxy Ltd., Cipla Ltd., and Alkem Laboratories Ltd.
content.Infrastructure: HIMT College of Pharmacy offers a range of facilities and infrastructure to support its Pharmacy program. These include well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, a comprehensive library, and a computer lab with internet access. Additionally, the college provides a canteen, sports facilities, and medical services. The college also provides a properly functioning hostel with Wi-Fi and food facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: HIMT college location is good because a police station and metro station are nearby.

content.Placements: HIMT College of Pharmacy offers good placements according to Hindustan Times. Good salary packages are offered by foreign companies, ranging from 3 LPA to 15 LPA. Some faculty members prepare students for interviews, provide management training, and offer guidance for their aspirations.
content.Infrastructure: HIMT College has good infrastructure and well-maintained library, hostels, labs, and sports area. All blocks are provided with medical facilities, and Wi-Fi is available in college. Labs are well-equipped, and separate hostels are provided. The canteen provides hygienic snacks.

content.Placements: The average of students get placed is 20 out of fifty as per past five years data, this may also because of covid 19 wave in India. review_content.Placements: Since it was an MBBS college we didn't have placements but we had internships during the last and final years where we received an amount of Rs 5000 every month. overview_faqs.answer: Heritage Institute of Medical Sciences is a renowned institution offering MD, MS, MBBS. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good in academics.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of students were selected for better placement with the highest and average package. The internship is good in our college and it offers a top course MBBS paramedical nursing course is also available and offers good placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Our college provides Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, a cafeteria, etc. The food served in the mess is good. They charge the food menu every day. We have a canteen. Games and sports facilities are good. Our college is good in all aspects.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and has very good infrastructure and facilities available.

content.Placements: The college has produced 10 batches, starting from the 2015 batch to the most recent 2024 batch. It offers MBBS, BPT, and Nursing courses. Internships are provided by the college hospital to all batches. Placements are good, and many students clear NEET PG after completing their courses.
content.Infrastructure: Cleanliness, room quality, ventilation, furniture, mess food quality, and the availability of amenities like Wi-Fi facility are all perfect. Girls' hostel has 4-sharing rooms, and boys' hostel has 3-sharing rooms. The library facilities are available to all batches. A canteen and a coffee shop are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Heritage Institute of Medical Sciences.

content.Placements: Since it was an MBBS college we didn't have placements but we had internships during the last and final years where we received an amount of Rs 5000 every month. I know some of you might have felt it was very little but it might have increased over time and we got to learn as the patient inflow was decent.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was decent and the college campus was small not too big. The classrooms were well furnished with AC and we had library, separate reading room and internet section in the college building. The hostel feedback was average as they allotted one room to three people and the mess food was also okay. There were no dedicated grounds or courts for any sport but we could still play them and enjoy them.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best Pvt. Medical College in UP.

content.Placements: MBBS course as such does not offer packages, but students after graduation have cleared interviews and post-graduation exams and got placed in reputed institutions. The college offers great opportunities in every field of jobs whichever one wants to choose.
content.Infrastructure: There are 3 hostels overall for MBBS students, a different hostel for PG students as well. 24/7 Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms have centralized AC. Hostel mess has good quality food. Medical facilities are available 24/7. There are regular sports events being organized in college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Heritage Medical College, Varanasi

content.Placements: The currently MBBS 2023 batch can pursue a good career in a doctorate as the college provides placements in internships and it also has a good patient flow for the better exercise of practicing on patients for better understanding of the concepts and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of college is good with decent patient flow. It has lecture theaters which are well furnished and have many other things which provide better facilities to students. Also, the practical rooms are pretty good and have many other important things required with all equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in academics.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Our college provides Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, a cafeteria, etc. The food served in the mess is good. They charge the food menu every day. We have a canteen. Games and sports facilities are good. Our college is good in all aspects.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and has very good infrastructure and facilities available.
reviews.review_text: Cleanliness, room quality, ventilation, furniture, mess food quality, and the availability of amenities like Wi-Fi facility are all perfect. Girls' hostel has 4-sharing rooms, and boys' hostel has 3-sharing rooms. The library facilities are available to all batches. A canteen and a coffee shop are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Heritage Institute of Medical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was decent and the college campus was small not too big. The classrooms were well furnished with AC and we had library, separate reading room and internet section in the college building. The hostel feedback was average as they allotted one room to three people and the mess food was also okay. There were no dedicated grounds or courts for any sport but we could still play them and enjoy them.

reviews.review_heading: Best Pvt. Medical College in UP.
reviews.review_text: There are 3 hostels overall for MBBS students, a different hostel for PG students as well. 24/7 Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms have centralized AC. Hostel mess has good quality food. Medical facilities are available 24/7. There are regular sports events being organized in college.

reviews.review_heading: Heritage Medical College, Varanasi
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good with decent patient flow. It has lecture theaters which are well furnished and have many other things which provide better facilities to students. Also, the practical rooms are pretty good and have many other important things required with all equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Life as a student at Heritage Institute of Medical Science .
reviews.review_text: The best thing about our college is its lecture theater (LT). They are fully air-conditioned, with a seating capacity of over 200 students in LT 1 and LT 2, and 170 students in LT 3 and LT 4. The library at our college is also excellent. It is fully air-conditioned, with a seating capacity of 60–70 in the central library and 80–85 in the outside reading room. Both are air-conditioned. We have a common ground for all our sports activities, and the annual festival, Panacea, is conducted on this gr...

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the faculty members. Infrastructure is also good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good in the lecture theater. We are provided with a projector and AC's. Seats and benches are well furnished and clean. I'm living in a girls' hostel; in one room, four girls live together. Rooms are large. There are common washrooms on each and every floor. Each washroom contains 10 toilets, 10 bathrooms and 10 bases. The hostel facility is so. Mess provides hygienic food. There is a badminton court, football ground, table tennis, chess, carrom, and many more sports and games ava...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is eco-friendly.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are excellent. Classrooms are air-conditioned and well-ventilated. Around 200 students can accommodate easily in the classrooms. There is a huge library, and several books are available. It is the best college for students. Canteen is available. Sports are conducted. We also have a gym facility in this college.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best private medical colleges in India.
reviews.review_text: The college has four well maintained, hygienic canteens, one each for the hospital, college and each hostel. The college building has centralised air-conditioned library and lecture theatres. The hospital also has centralised air conditioners. The campus remains well-maintained, neat and hygienic throughout the year.

reviews.review_heading: In this college, only teaching and results are good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and laboratories were fine, but Wi-Fi was not enabled on the campus. The library was normal but without Wi-Fi, and with timing from 9.00 AM to 9.00 PM. The library should be accessible to students 24X7, and the food was good. But the accommodation was not good. Around 4 students in one room with no attached washrooms for girls. The sports and games facility was average with space for basic games.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very neat and clean.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has mess which has good quality departments, classrooms are air-conditioned. The food served is tasty and we enjoy it a lot. It has Wi-Fi, labs, and all other things available. We also have a library. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also provided. I would recommend students to join here as quality education is provided. We also have many canteens.

reviews.review_heading: In the future, it might be one of the best private institutes that India has got.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is incomplete, and the work is still in progress. The Facilities provided are almost same as compared to other hostels, but they give a pleasant and hygienic environment. Mess food is fine. They charge you for medical facilities but provide you with the best service. They have sports like football, cricket, volleyball, badminton and events like Event- Panacea.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides very good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi labs practical labs, medicine lab, and canteen with fresh food and many other things are provided over here. I got fresh vegetables and some other food. They are very delicious and hot. All those cooks and bawarchi are well trained and professional in their work.

paragraphs: Sanjivani College of Pharmaceutical Education and Research admission 2025is open. TheSCPERinstitute offers Degrees, Diploma courses including 2 UG and 6 PG programs. These programs are offered in Full Time mode. The institute is affiliated toSavitribai Phule Pune UniversityCandidates can pursue multiple ranges of courses like BPharma, DPharma, and MPharma in the stream of Medicine & Health Sciences. Admission to these courses is based on entrance exams such as MHT CET, NEET and GPAT.

Candidates interested in getting into SCPER are required to follow the MHT CET, NEET and GPAT exam and application process. After the same, the University allots colleges and courses to the students. Check out the below table for details onSCPER courseadmission which is inclusive of its eligibility & selection:
Class 12 with 45% and 40% for reservation in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics/ Biology
B.Pharma Graduate With at least 55% in aggregate (50% for backward class category/ Physically Handicapped)

SCPER course admissions 2025 for all of its courses are done based on entrance exams. Check below the complete Sanjivani College of Pharmaceutical Education and Research admission process:Application:The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.
Selection rounds:The college follows a Centralized Admission Process (CAP) conducted by DTE, Maharashtra, for seat allocation in its various programs.
Admission confirmation:Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college

faqs.answer: The admission process at Sanjivani College of Pharmaceutical Education and Research is multi-step process. SCPER course admissions 2025 for all of its courses are done based on entrance exams. Check below the complete Sanjivani College of Pharmaceutical Education and Research admission process:Application:The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.Selection rounds:The college follows a Centralized Admission Process (CAP) conducted by DTE, Maharashtra, for seat allocation in its various programs.Admission confirmation:Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for Sanjivani College of Pharmaceutical Education and Research?
faqs.answer: Candidates interested in getting into SCPER are required to follow the MHT CET, NEET and GPAT exam and application process. After the same, the University allots colleges and courses to the students. Check out the below table for details on SCPER course admission which is inclusive of its eligibility & selection and Tuiton fees:CoursesTuition FeesEligibilityBPharmaINR 7.2 lakhClass 12 with 45%Selection:MHT CET/NEETDPharmaINR 1.4 lakhClass 12MPharmaINR 3.6 lakhGraduation with 55%Selection:GPAT

faqs.question: What is MHT CET schedule?
faqs.answer: Students can go tothispage to know the MHT CET schedule for admission to BE/BTech, BPharma, and BArch courses. This year onwards, the MHT CET exam will be conducted in two sessions, similar to the national-level JEE Mains exam.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of campus life, which is exciting and amazing.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 95% of students get placed. The average package is 7 LPA. Students get placed in companies like Palo Alto, etc. Roles offered are awesome. The internship thing is also good on this campus. We get amazing opportunities. There is a good environment.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of the campus are awesome. We have a library, labs, an auditorium, etc. Medical facilities are also there. All facilities are good. It has an amazing mess.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are so helpful and very qualified. Semester exams are not so difficult, but are at a good standard level. The course curriculum is good. Exams level is good. NIT-qualified teachers are teaching in our college. The book authors are also, and we are extremely honored there. Faculty members are very supportive, and they give us direction for our lives and also for placements.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBA in International Business - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am really blessed to be in this college.

review_content.Placements: On average, more than 83% of students get placed in our course. The highest package offered is 33 LPA, and the lowest package offered ranges from 6-10 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Genpact, Cognizant, IBM, etc. The percentage of students who got internships is 83%.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are top-notch. There is a Wi-Fi facility in all classrooms with a comfortable branch and library. The infrastructure is amazing, and each building has a library. The quality of facilities is available, and labs are well-equipped. Hostel facilities are good. There is good food in the hostel mess. Medical facilities are available. The quality of education is good.

review_summary.college_name: Amity University Gwalior Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with what is happening.

content.Placements: 80 per cent are placed. 24 LPA is the highest package, 2 LPA is the lowest, and the average is 2.5 LPA. MuSigma is the highest recruiting company in the State. 30% of students got an internship at Wipro and TCS. Sales and Software engineer interns are offered.
content.Infrastructure: It's available in the course/department. Wi-Fi, Labs, classrooms and the library are present. I am not a hosteller, so I can't tell much about that, but my friends are, so the food is average for everyday purposes, else the mess, canteen and medical facilities are there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great campus with excellent facilities and strict attendance.

content.Placements: 65 to 60 percent of students got placed last year. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA, the average is 6 LPA-10 LPA, and the highest is 35 LPA. Recruiting companies are Palo Alto, Infosys, and Ishan Technologies. 20 to 30 percent of students got internships from my course in TCS and Wipro. Software developer, cloud engineer, and data analyst are roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is quite good. Labs are not that good. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned, libraries are big, the quality of food is great, top medical facilities, and big grounds for each sport and game. Sometimes Wi-Fi stops working for 2 or 3 days. Labs are mainly considered as a free period.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of campus life, which is exciting and amazing.

content.Placements: Approximately 95% of students get placed. The average package is 7 LPA. Students get placed in companies like Palo Alto, etc. Roles offered are awesome. The internship thing is also good on this campus. We get amazing opportunities. There is a good environment.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of the campus are awesome. We have a library, labs, an auditorium, etc. Medical facilities are also there. All facilities are good. It has an amazing mess.
content.Faculty: Teachers are so helpful and very qualified. Semester exams are not so difficult, but are at a good standard level. The course curriculum is good. Exams level is good. NIT-qualified teachers are teaching in our college. The book authors are also, and we are extremely honored there. Faculty members are very supportive, and they give us direction for our lives and also for placements.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in International Business - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am really blessed to be in this college.

content.Placements: On average, more than 83% of students get placed in our course. The highest package offered is 33 LPA, and the lowest package offered ranges from 6-10 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Genpact, Cognizant, IBM, etc. The percentage of students who got internships is 83%.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are top-notch. There is a Wi-Fi facility in all classrooms with a comfortable branch and library. The infrastructure is amazing, and each building has a library. The quality of facilities is available, and labs are well-equipped. Hostel facilities are good. There is good food in the hostel mess. Medical facilities are available. The quality of education is good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best university in India with good placements.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed in our Amity University is 98%. In our course, almost 93% of students got placed. The highest package offered is 52 LPA and the lowest package is 2.4 LPA. Companies like Bioneeds, BiOZEEN, Mankind, and GH visit the college and hire students. Internship opportunities are offered to students at Cipla and most of the students get jobs here.
content.Infrastructure: It provides facilities like Wi-Fi, parking, RO water, a sports room, and a library. We can only enter the library if we have a library ID card. It is easy to get a library ID card as we have to just fill form and attach the fee receipt. Classrooms are so clean. The infrastructure is amazing and I love it. Each department has different blocks with all facilities. Medical facilities are provided. The food in the canteen is very tasty.

admission_overview.title: Amity University Gwalior Admission Overview 2026

BTech, MBA, BBA are some of the top courses offered by the university. Interested students can read below to know more about the courses and admission process for Amity University Gwalior.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for Amity University Gwalior admission?

faqs.answer: Amity University makes BSc admissions based on scores in the higher secondary examination. Interested students must fill out the application form available on the official website of the university. Once the application process is concluded, the students are further shortlisted based on marks in Class 12 and the university’s respective seat intake for the concerned course. Next, the shortlisted students are required to report to the institute for document verification and fee payment. Successful fee payment completes the admission process.
faqs.question: How can I get admission BSc admission in Amity University Gwalior?

paragraphs: Amity University Gwalior admissionsstarts from January every year. The process begins with submission of online application. It is then followed by selection process and admission confirmation. Students can follow the steps given below to complete theAmity Gwalior admission process:
Amity Gwalior Application Process 2026

The mode of application for Amity University Gwalior is online. Interested candidates can submit the application form with relevant details and documents to the admission portal. As per the university's website, the application fee is fully waived off as a humanitarian measure.
Amity Gwalior Selection Process 2026
The university conducts its entrance exam, AMCAT for shortlisting candidates. The university accepts students based on the following criteria:
Amity Gwalior Admission confirmation 2026
After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay theAmity Gwalior feesto confirm their seat in the university.
lists: Merit-based admissions: For courses, such as BA, BDes, BCom, BCA, etc., Class 12 scores are the sole criteria.

Entrance-based admissions: To get admission in courses, such as MBA, BTech, BArch, etc., students need to submit valid state or national-level entrance test scores or appear for the AMCAT. The accepted exams include CAT, MAT, XAT, CUET UG, JEE Main, etc.
Academic Score + Personal Interview: For admission to most of the PG courses, such as MPhil, LLM, MA, etc., students need to appear for PI round/ university-level test.

placement_data.title: Amity University Gwalior Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The placement report 2025 is not released. The overall highest and average package recorded during Amity University Gwalior placements 2024 was INR 45 LPA and 5.14 LPA . The overall placement rate was 93.17% . A total of 297 companies visited and 372 offers were made in 2024.
The overall placement rate recorded in Amity Gwalior School of Engineering and Technology placements 2024 was 87.4%. BTech highest was 45 LPA . The overall average package in ASET was 5.99 LPA .
In MBA program, the highest and average package recorded in 2024 was 9 LPA and 5.17 LPA . The placement rate was 100% .
100% placement was recorded in 2024 during Amity Gwalior School of BioTechnology . The highest package offered was 4.76 LPA . The average and median package was 3.15 LPA and 2.52 LPA.
The highest, average and median package recorded during School of Pharmacy placement 2024 was 6 LPA, 3.03 LPA and 2.52 LPA . The placement rate recorded was 83.33%.

faqs.question: Are there any government job opportunities that I can seek after completing M.Tech from Amity University Gwalior?

faqs.question: Are internships a part of B.Com LLB (H) curriculum at Amity University, Gwlaior?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amity University Gwalior acknowledges the importance of hands-on exposure by including various internship periods in the BCom LLB (H) syllabus. From the third semester, students are required to complete one internship in every alternate semester. In total, they must complete three internships. This provides students with the opportunity to get hands-on experience and add valuable experience on their CVs before the on-campus placements.

highlights.description: Amity Gwalior is one of India’s top institutes and has been ranked by multiple national ranking bodies. In the recent NIRF 2025 release, the institute ranked #201-300 under the Engineering category. The institute is popular for its top-notch research programmes. The below article covers all the information around Amity Gwalior rankings:

nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, Amity Gwalior outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Amity Gwalior's rank is #201, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.
Read less

outlook.description:
Amity Gwalior has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by Outlook-ICARE 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'BBA' category, the institute's ranks have displayed constancy in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Amity Gwalior's rank is #93, the same as last year's rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
Explore the Amity Gwalior latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:
Read less

qs_world.description:
Amity Gwalior has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2026, Amity Gwalior fell 250 ranks to #1101 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It has been seen that in the 'Southern Asia' category, the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Amity Gwalior fell 84 ranks to #362 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: Amity University Gwalior Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: All rooms are well lit & well ventilated, with geysers in bathrooms & television in the common rooms. Each student is provided with a separate bed, mattress, pillow, pillow covers and sheets, almirah and study table with chair.All the hostels are Wi-Fi enabled and the student can access the net 24/7 from their rooms. The students are also provided free laundry services.

library.description: Besides a huge Central Library, the University also has five Departmental Libraries for Engineering, Management, Law, Architecture and Psychology. The libraries have a rich stock of books, digital database, on line journals (E – Resource), National / International journals with hard and soft copies, Magazines and National / Regional newspapers in Hindi and English are available for Students / Research Scholars. In addition all libraries have adequate number of computer terminals to access the Internet. The library has over 20,000 online journals. Amity has the membership of MANUPATRA, DELNET, Sodh Ganga, National Digital Library (NDL), All India Reporter, Supreme Court Cases online. All Amity students are members of Amizone-Amity Intranet Zone which allows them easy access to these journals & papers. Amity students also have the rights to access of Ebsco Host ,Taylor & Francis, IEEE, ACM Digital library etc.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Lawn Tennis, Sports Ground

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with what is happening.
reviews.review_text: It's available in the course/department. Wi-Fi, Labs, classrooms and the library are present. I am not a hosteller, so I can't tell much about that, but my friends are, so the food is average for everyday purposes, else the mess, canteen and medical facilities are there.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus with excellent facilities and strict attendance.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is quite good. Labs are not that good. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned, libraries are big, the quality of food is great, top medical facilities, and big grounds for each sport and game. Sometimes Wi-Fi stops working for 2 or 3 days. Labs are mainly considered as a free period.

reviews.review_heading: Review of campus life, which is exciting and amazing.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the campus are awesome. We have a library, labs, an auditorium, etc. Medical facilities are also there. All facilities are good. It has an amazing mess.

reviews.review_heading: I am really blessed to be in this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are top-notch. There is a Wi-Fi facility in all classrooms with a comfortable branch and library. The infrastructure is amazing, and each building has a library. The quality of facilities is available, and labs are well-equipped. Hostel facilities are good. There is good food in the hostel mess. Medical facilities are available. The quality of education is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best university in India with good placements.
reviews.review_text: It provides facilities like Wi-Fi, parking, RO water, a sports room, and a library. We can only enter the library if we have a library ID card. It is easy to get a library ID card as we have to just fill form and attach the fee receipt. Classrooms are so clean. The infrastructure is amazing and I love it. Each department has different blocks with all facilities. Medical facilities are provided. The food in the canteen is very tasty.

reviews.review_heading: My college life in short.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available. Staff and all are so good. Also, wardens are very supportive. Food is really tasty. All sports are available and coaches are also allotted. We have Wi-Fi and classes are very comfortable. Our campus has best environment for learning. Library has all the necessary resources. The campus is also very beautiful and we are allowed to walk freely.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, helpful faculty, and decent placements, but more industry exposure is needed.
reviews.review_text: Amity University Gwalior offered good Wi-Fi, modern labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostels were clean with decent rooms, the mess food was average, the canteen had a variety, medical help was available, and sports facilities were well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best universities in our state.
reviews.review_text: The university offers separate hostels for male and female students, with options for single, double, or triple occupancy. Rooms are fully furnished with beds, study tables, wardrobes, and chairs. It is equipped with 24x7 high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: It has very good infrastructure, has Ph.D. qualified teachers', and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: Amity University has a very good and attractive infrastructure, which is comfortable for students to survive in various places. They have digital classrooms and a fully air-conditioned campus, which is very comfortable for students. They also have a lift facility.

reviews.review_heading: I will recommend this college to all the people who want some good opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Amity University Gwalior has incredible infrastructure on all campuses. The hostel facilities are also good. The food tastes amazing. Labs have all-new equipment. The Wi-Fi speed is amazing it connects all around. On campus, every area is covered with Wi-Fi. The library is also good and all the spots have fast access of Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, and the hostel and mess are average.
reviews.review_text: Hostels were good but a bit costly for everyone, I guess. The food was usually average, not that good, not that bad, but it was just sufficient for you to live. Then we came to the infrastructure, which was really good. They provided great surroundings to live in. We have too many activities that keep going around which will help you to find your space anyhow.

reviews.review_heading: Amity is a synonym of success.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi, labs, etc. I love it. Classrooms are structured. The library is very good. Classrooms are AC. We have an ambulance. Doctors are available for contingency. The college has a photo lab, TV lab,  cinema lab, and editing lab. They have cameras and lights.

reviews.review_heading: We have a great campus and life.
reviews.review_text: The college has studio labs, a photos lab, an editing lab, an animation lab, a fact check lab, a library, a Wi-Fi, lab, ICT-enabled classes, an AC campus, and a well-equipped gym. The quality of the mess is good and the hostel cab opted with and without AC. The college provides 24x7 power supply. Doctors are available throughout the year.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best place to grow and study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good and positive. It has anticipated and sophisticated classrooms, spacious sports facilities, and well-equipped labs. Campuses are frequently large and kept up nicely. Although opinions differ, many emphasize good Wi-Fi and sufficient facilities. The environment is very positive there.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and good campus.
reviews.review_text: On the campus, Wi-Fi is available. The library is available. Classrooms are fully furnished, and labs are good. The hostel infrastructure is good. Medical facilities are good. The mess food is good. Rules in the hostel are just like jail, which is only one negative thing in the hostel. The infrastructure is good.

paragraphs: Students who are officially enrolled in Amity University Gwalior M.Tech courses and wish to live on campus premises can opt for hostel facilities. As per official sources, the hostel fees here range from NR 1.15 Lacs to INR 1.2 lakh.
Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per official sources. However, it is subject to change.

Amity University Gwalior does provide a fee refund if you wish to cancel your admission before the commencement of the academic session. Tabulated below is the fee refund based on the period remaining before the commencement of the academic session.
Fee Refund
Eligibility Criteria
100% of the semester fees and the Security Deposit after deduction of an amount not more than 5% of the fees (subject to a maximum of INR 5000) as processing charges
15 days before the commencement of the academic session
90% of the semester fees and the Security Deposit
Less than 15 days before the commencement of the academic session
80% of the semester fees and the Security Deposit.
Up to 15 days post the commencement of the academic session,
50% of the semester fees and the Security Deposit.
Between 16-30 days post the commencement of the academic session the student
No refund
Post 30 days of commencement of the academic session
Note: The above information has been sourced from the official website of the university. However, it is subject to changes.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: A better place to excel in life.

content.Placements: Our college has partnerships with hospitals, research institutions, and pharmaceutical industries, ensuring that postgraduate students get internships in desired disciplines. Since our college excels in academics with supportive training, students get placed in top industries with good packages.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi enabled campus, well-stocked library with books and journals, free internet access in the library, well-equipped laboratories, and animal house, all assure and help students to excel in their field. Separate hostel facilities are available for girls and boys with good quality food. Affordable and tasty dishes are available in the college canteen. Sports and cultural events are conducted annually to explore our talents.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutical Chemistry - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: If you are passionate about pharmacy & seek an enriching educational experience, look no further.

content.Placements: Throughout the job search process, the career services staff offered individualized support in the pharmaceutical industry. The college's solid connection with neighborhood pharmacies and medical facilities. To anyone thinking about professions in pharmacy, I heartily recommend the C. L. Baid Metha College of Pharmacy.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of C. L. Baid Metha College of Pharmacy is built to accommodate the changing demands of pharmacy research and education. Faculty and students can use the animal cabinet, well-equipped machinery rooms, and specialized software for drug development and discovery. Additionally, all the classrooms have smart board facilities and lecture hall facilities.

faqs.question: Q: Which is the best course at SOP Sharda University?

faqs.answer: No, a 75 percentile CUET score is not going to give you direct admission to Sharda University’s School of Pharmacy’s B.Pharma program.CUET results are not currently used by Sharda University for pharmacy admissions .The primary means of admission to the B.Pharma programme at SOP Sharda University is through Class 12 grades or scores on qualifying entrance exams.The eligibility for B.Pharma requires passing 10+2 with a 50% cumulative grade in PCB, PCM, and PCMB subjects
faqs.question: Q: Can I get B.Pharma at SOP Sharda University with 75 percentile in CUET?

faqs.answer: minimum marks: 55% - 65% in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology/Mathematics from your 10+2 exams.Focus on meeting the basic eligibility criteria (50% minimum) and striving for strong marks overall.
faqs.question: Q: What are the minimum marks required for D.Pharma at SOP Sharda University 2023?

faqs.answer: While receiving a 60% in your class 12 Diploma ensures that you will be given consideration for admission to SOP Sharda University's B.Pharma program, calculating your precise odds is difficult and depends on a number of factors:Qualifications: SOP Sharda University does not make available the minimal score needed for admission to the B.Pharma program.Competition & Seat Availability: Your prospects will be impacted by the amount of applicants in your year who have equal or better marks.

overview_faqs.question: How is life at School of Pharmacy (SOP), Sharda University?
overview_faqs.answer: Life at the School of Pharmacy (SOP) at Sharda University is described as a blend of learning, and integration of enduring principles. As a part of the Sharda family, students have an opportunity to show potential through exposure to virtually every field of academics, and co-curricular activities. The faculty at SOP are described as helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The curriculum is relevant and designed to make students industry-ready. Overall, life at SOP, Sharda University provides a comprehensive environment for personal and professional growth.

overview_faqs.answer: Yes, School of Pharmacy (SOP) Sharda University is good for D.Pharma. School of Pharmacy (SOP) Sharda University is known for being one of the fastest-emerging schools at Sharda University. SOP has good infrastructure and nice campus. The SOP offers various programs, including the Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma) and Ph.D in Pharmacy, etc. SOP Sharda University has all the facilities for students.

review_summary.college_name: SOP Sharda University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied overall.

content.Placements: Pharma.D course is the best for someone in search of their career in pharmacovigilance, research, and clinical pharmacology. It opens doors to the hospital as well as pharmaceutical industries. Pharma.D course will also help you work on your research projects and study both human body and medicine.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel provides a safe and secure environment with the best quality food and living. Guards are available 24 hour at our services. It has 24 hour ambulance, and hospital is also available nearby. Our campus is supportive and calm at every point with great living for both boys and girls.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure, vibrant campus life, good scholarships, but faculty members' quality varies.

content.Placements: Around 65-100% of students got placed in this college. The highest salary package offered is 7 LPA. The lowest salary package offered varies from 2 LPA - 3 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Patanjali, Cipla, Sun Pharma, and Himalaya. Students also get internships in companies like Sun Pharma and Viola. Pharmacy assistant, medical representative, sales executive, researcher, pharmacist, and technician., are the roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Sharda University provides a Wi-Fi-enabled campus. It has well-equipped pharmaceutical and chemistry laboratories. Classrooms are spacious and air-conditioned with projectors. It also has a resourceful library with textbooks, journals, and online research materials for D.Pharma students. Hostels have furnished rooms, along with Wi-Fi facilities 24/7. Mess food is varied. Medical center, sports facilities, and gym are available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Not satisfied because of the fees structure.

content.Placements: Very few students got placed in our college. I don't have any idea about the packages offered, but according to the information I got, the average package is around 1 to 3 LPA. Companies which came to the college for placements are not very big or good. Very few companies come to the college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. All the courses have very good here. All the labs and classrooms have AC, and Wi-Fi is available all over the university. Libraries are very well-maintained, and a majority of books are present here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are knowledgeable, placements are decent.

content.Placements: If you are totally into it, then you are surely going to get it. Actually, they provide 100% placements but few of the students go for abroad study and for higher studies, so they don't even sit for placements. Otherwise, you will get a job with decent packages.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the campus as sharda Wi-Fi. Rooms of college have AC and are ventilated enough. Central library is one of the loved place in the campus for those who love calm places. The environment of library is study friendly. They have an indoor game courts too.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college is fine with decent placements.

content.Placements: Placements are good enough if students are willing then they will get it. Some students sit in placements and some do not sit to gets placements with decent package, and some students go for business also.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Classrooms have air-conditioners and projectors. Teachers use mics so they can make students understand clearly. Classrooms are well ventilated and a few rooms are provided with step-up. The classrooms desks are also comfortable. Everything is good about infrastructure.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very supportive and students can ask for help and they will be ready to help always. The curriculum is followed as per PCI. The syllabus is completed on time. There are two sessionals one end-term exam along with practicals followed by viva.

admission_process.title: School of Pharmacy, Sharda University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sharda University admissions to its School of Pharmacy are done via SUSAT or JEE/CET/CLAT/LSAT/CAT/MAT/XAT/NATA/NEET/CUET scores. The admission process begins with applying for the entrance exam. Find below the completeSchool of Pharmacy, Sharda University admission process2025:
Step 1: SOP Sharda University Application Process 2025

For SOP, Sharda University course admissions, the first step is to fill out an online application form. Aspirants who apply via SUAT are required to visit the official website of Sharda University to apply for the course and book a slot for the SUAT exam. They also have to pay an application fee of INR 1,500 for male and INR 1,000 for female candidates.
Step 2: SOP Selection Rounds

Candidates can either get admission via the SUAT or CUET UG exams. Aspirants are required to qualify for any of the respective exams with a valid score. Further, they also have to appear for a PI round conducted by the School of Pharmacy, Sharda University.
Step 3: SOP Counselling Process

The university will shortlist candidates based on their past academic records, entrance exam scores & PI round performance. The university will release the list of selected candidates and a provisional admission will be offered to those candidates.
Step 4: Fee Submission & Documents Verification

The selected candidates will be required to pay the course fee via Cash/ DD/ Credit-Debit Card or through Online payment. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theSOP Sharda University feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

placement_data.title: SOP Sharda University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: School of Pharmacy (SOP), Sharda University has not released its placement report for the batch passing out in 2023. It will be updated here as and when released by the university. However, some of the top recruiters who participated during the recent year's placement process are available on the official website. Popular recruiters who participated in School of Pharmacy placements include Batra Hospital, AcuLife, SupplyCopia, Homoeoamigo, etc.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at SOP Sharda University?
faqs.answer: The highest package of 1 crore was offered at SOP Sharda University. The university apart from this offers a median package of 3.2 Lacs. Recruitment is done from some of the best medical institutions and hospitals all over the country. Sharda University has a well-established placement process for its students. The university claims to have placed over 65% to 100% of students in various companies since 1996. The placement process is transparent and commences with the uploading of students' profiles on the placement portal. The leading companies from all sectors are invited by the Placement Department on the campus, where eligible students are facilitated to go. The School of Pharmacy (SOP) at Sharda University has a 100% placement record, with the lowest package of 4 LPA and the highest package of 8 LPA. Sharda University follows a strict placement policy to ensure that each deserving candidate gets an opportunity for on-campus placement. The university has a list of top recruiters, including Amazon India, BYJU's, Wipro HR Services, and TCS, among others

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of SOP Sharda University?
faqs.answer: Top recruiters at the School of Pharmacy, Sharda University: Patanjali: Patanjali Ayurved Limited is an Indian consumer goods company, manufacturing units, and headquarters are located in the industrial area of Haridwar, while the registered office is located at Delhi. Cipla: Cipla primarily develops medicines to treat respiratory, and cardiovascular disease. Sun Pharma: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Limited is an Indian multinational pharmaceutical company headquartered in Mumbai, Maharashtra. Himalaya: It produces health care products under the name Himalaya Herbal Healthcare whose products include ayurvedic ingredients. In addition to these, some students also got internships in Sun Pharma and Viola. Other popular recruiters who participated in School of Pharmacy placements include Batra Hospital, AcuLife, SupplyCopia, and Homoeoamigo.

faqs.question: Which branch is best in B.Pharma at SOP Sharda University?
faqs.answer: There are no branches offered under B.Pharma at SOP, Sharda University. Courses offered by School of Pharmacy (SOP) Sharda University is Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm) which cost around 90000 per semester, D.Pharm which cost around 60000 per semester and Ph.D in Pharmacy which cost around 40000 per semester. For Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm) the core pharmacy subjects include Pharmaceutics, Pharmaceutical Chemistry, Pharmacognosy and Pharmacology. The admission criteria for B.Pharm is minimum 50% marks in 10+2 in PCB.

reviews.review_heading: It has average faculty, good placements, good infrastructure, and average hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are good. Hostels are average or below-average, and the food is average. A canteen is available, and they serve good food. Medical facilities are good. Indoor and outdoor sports and games courts are available. There is a basketball court, badminton court, both indoor and outdoor, table tennis, and a gym (paid) are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of School of Pharmacy, Sharda University.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities are well-equipped, and our college is very supportive of all kinds of problems. The infrastructure of our college was very good. Our classrooms are well-equipped with air-conditioners and smart classrooms. All the books are available in the library, and our IT department resolves all the problem of Wi-Fi. In labs, all equipment is available, and whatever we need, it reaches before time on our working slab. I am staying outside the college hostel, so I don't know much about...

reviews.review_heading: Overall experience is good with highly trained faculty.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and labs in our college are very good and very clean. Food and snacks provided in the hostel are healthy and best in taste. Overall cleanliness in hostel and mess is good. Sports tournament are organized every month between courses and colleges. Experience is good.

reviews.review_heading: All is good in the college.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are good Wi-Fi labs classroom library grounds ets labs are neat and clean faculty comes in times in the lab and in the classroom. Free Wi-Fi in every part of the college girls hostel sepate Wi-Fi boys hostel separate. Good in the all over field.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2015, and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very good. Campus life is very good, with a big and beautiful park. Wi-Fi is available everywhere. Sports and games are also available, like badminton, basketball, and cricket. The mess food is good, the canteen is clean and big, and it is cost-friendly. The mess is clean. A campus hostel is available.

reviews.review_heading: It's a very good university.
reviews.review_text: There are very good facilities in Sharda University. Wi-Fi is very fast and high-speed. The classrooms are digital, and the library is also very clean and good. There is a good environment in the university. Everyone feels safe and friendly. Food is also very good and cheap in price.

reviews.review_heading: My Experience on Sharda University.
reviews.review_text:
Overall Infrastructures is excellent classes are having ACs Wi-Fi facilities available has a decent or can we say that one of the best library in greater Noida
u2022 Hostels has average facilities when I come to food is okay
Sharda has to many hostels AC, non AC having okay for new come.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for everyone to get admission.
reviews.review_text: University has a very good infrastructure. It is fully furnished and air-conditioned. It provides free Wi-Fi service 24x7. Rooms and classes are very neat, clean, and well maintained. There is a very friendly environment.

review_summary.college_name: OCP,Sanpada Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for the pharmacy.

content.Placements: The placements are available at this college, but not for higher packages. All students will get placements, and I suggest pursuing a Doctor of Pharmacy to secure a higher-paying job. Alternatively, you can start your own medical venture, which is also a good option.
content.Infrastructure: The college's infrastructure is good, with Wi-Fi available. The classrooms are clean and well-maintained, and the library is also good. The quality of food in the canteen is excellent, but the prices are high outside the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a very nice college for B.Pharma. It has well organised labs and good teachers.

content.Placements: There were no placements offered to us in our B. M. department. But the other department had their placements. But in our department companies like Zee TV, Radio FM 93.5, 104.0, used to come for internship purposes. All the media line channels like NDTV and Aaj Tak used to come for internship purposes. On placement basis, our college was below average.
content.Infrastructure: On an average, I will give 6 out of 10 rating to infrastructure and facilities. There was no Wi-Fi connection available, but our classrooms and library were decent enough. We also had a medicinal facility for emergency scenario. The computer lab and other lab rooms were advanced and good enough to operate. It was all advanced technology and clean. Our canteen had a decent amount of menu list. The quality of the food was also good. I shall give 7 out of 10 rating to food. There were no hostel rooms in our college.

content.Infrastructure: The labs are well developed and all the necessary equipment and chemicals are available. content.Infrastructure: All necessary books are available in the library, with a proper, spacious place to sit and read. Classrooms are provided with AC's and Wi-Fi. Hostels have spacious and clean rooms as well as bathrooms. Food is good and healthy, and nonveg is provided once per week.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with low percentile, if you belong from UP or Bihar.

content.Placements: The college is a Hindi linguistics minority; low percentile students from up to Bihar, Uttarakhand, can apply. For gernal catagory in MHT CET, there should be a score of 95 percentile. In Oriental, there is as much good placement, but only a few students get placement. I'm only in my first year, but I'm learning a lot from them. The average package is INR 2 lakh per annum; there are not as many top companies coming from the last two years. New companies visit, and some small companies, such as ARTC and Cognizant, are two companies that visit the Oriental. At this college, no internships are provided.

All necessary books are available in the library, with a proper, spacious place to sit and read. Classrooms are provided with AC's and Wi-Fi.
Hostels have spacious and clean rooms as well as bathrooms. Food is good and healthy, and nonveg is provided once per week.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with low percentile, if you belong from UP or Bihar.
reviews.review_text: The faculty of the college are well qualified; some are Ph.D. holders. Wi-Fi is available, and there is a library where you can take two books or seven days in one semester for home or college. Classrooms are also well maintained; full AC and soundproofing are also available. The disadvantage of college is that if the canteen is not well organized and has no fixed menu, the prices are always high. In college, lots of sports, games, and other cultural activities are arranged, but you have to pay ...

reviews.review_heading: The college is great and the faculty as well.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are not quite well furnishes as the AC doesn't works good also there are honeybees coming from the windows and disturbing a while. The college does not supports us for the Ipa event and we don't even get any exceptions if we take a part from our own will. The labs are fine and the faculty members are great at some point. Canteen is mess and you don't want to eat there anyway.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for B.Pharma course.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, laboratories, and a library are available in our college. Classes are air-conditioned. Library has a wide range of books related to pharmacy. Hostels have high-speed Wi-Fi facilities. Hostels and the campus are under CCTV surveillance for the safety of the students. The atmosphere of our college is well-suited for students who are engaged in curricular and co-curricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Good option for students with less options .
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi is there. Good library is there, study area is also good and library is managed well, labs are average because it is poorly managed. Classrooms are average they have projectors, canteen is below average but prices are low for food and little unhygienic, sports are neglected and no extra curricular .

reviews.review_heading: Best pharmacy college with good classroom and library and the faculty too.
reviews.review_text: Fully AC classroom with digital support and a good library with plenty of books. The oriental college of pharmacy provides the standard book to reference and we can issue for home also. The Library is very comfortable with computer and Wi-Fi support and with an AC room.

reviews.review_heading: It is a perfect college. Placements are good in 2021 in a pandemic.
reviews.review_text: The quality of everything is the top priority of the college. The discipline and silence at the library are the keys to the college. It provides free Wi-Fi. The library has so many books like international journals too. Classrooms are spacious and can accommodate up to 100 students. It also has a projector.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are good labs and good classrooms here. All books are available in the library. Medical facilities are also available in our college, and non-teaching staff members are also helpful. Good quality food is provided in the canteen, and the hostel is also clean.

reviews.review_heading: OCP bags a number of international firms for placements.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is moderate, Good labs, lab attendants are good.
Classrooms are equipped with e-learning platforms which most of the teachers find difficult to operate, teaching mostly based on ppts.
The library is modern with ample books but students don't return the book on time, some students hoard books so that others cannot study!

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of the college is average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. The college is very good in terms of the academic infrastructure. There are amazing labs, and all the facilities are provided. The canteen which was in completely bad shape and looked like a cowshed earlier has become better now. The canteen was improved, but it is also not that good.

reviews.review_heading: A pathway to your success.
reviews.review_text: A not high profile. But a decent infrastructure to deal with a enthusiast atmosphere! A good 7 floored flourished college building with lifts 2 computer labs. Many laboratories. Equipped with libraries. (separate for pharmacy). Seminar halls. And first aid room.

reviews.review_heading: In short the college is good. If you want to gain knowledge college is good for that.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms is okay, Library is very good, many books are available. The classroom is very big and have projector And AC. Laboratory is Also very good and has all the material required. Wi-Fi is available and the best part is the college is just 2 mins from sanpad station.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has better hostels and average academics and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: You can get an average salary of Rs. 1,00,000 per month during your PG. A medical officer can get a salary of Rs. 50,000 per month. This may differ according to your state.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides average facilities and infrastructure. The boys' hostel is one the best in entire Maharashtra. Separate restrooms are available in every room. There are two students per room. There are two beds and mattresses. Geysers for hot hot water are also present in the hostel.
review_content.Faculty: The curriculum and faculty members in almost all the medical colleges are quite similar. You have to focus on self-study. We have 2 informative exams, 1 prelims, and 1 university exam. Our faculty members are very helpful and approachable. They help us whenever needed.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I'm very satisfied with my college infrastructure because it has air conditioning.

review_content.Placements: To get admission into MBBS, one competitive exam is held, the NEET, which we have to qualify for. There are lacs of students who participate, and thousands get selected. Our batch strength is 80; we are currently studying; after 4.5 years, we get into an internship, where we get the salary.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very nice. The new building is in construction as there is no adequate space to cover UG, PG, and hospital at one site. Hospital and college are at the same place, which provides us with knowledge of theory and also practical.
