review_summary.college_name: Rajiv Gandhi Medical College,Thane Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best course to study and have a happy life.

content.Placements: 100% placement is offered if you complete your MBBS degree from RAJIV GANDHI MEDICAL COLLEGE THANE. The package depends on students doing post-graduation after MBBS mostly. Packages depend on the hospital of choice, ranging from 70k to 200k Rs. The highest is in crores. 100% internships are offered. Top roles can be the owner of a multi-specialty hospital, head of a hospital, or head of the teaching faculty in various coaching institutes.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi connection in the library, and classrooms are well ventilated and have central AC with projectors for better demonstration of subjects in detail. Lab facilities are extraordinary; we have separate labs for each subject, like 19. They have all basic requirements in MBBS college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good education and training.

content.Placements: Each batch has 100 students. There is no tension regarding the package. Very good job opportunities are available with a 100% job guarantee. An internship is compulsory and must be done at Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Hospital. Both bachelor’s and master’s degrees are available. There is good interaction with all batchmates.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is nice but away from campus. Bus facilities are available. Library offers 24-hour service with Wi-Fi, and online learning facilities are also available there. All books are provided. Mess is not available, but college canteen is good, though it is not functional at the moment. The ground is small, but there is access to a nearby turf.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college has better hostels and average academics and infrastructure.

content.Placements: You can get an average salary of Rs. 1,00,000 per month during your PG. A medical officer can get a salary of Rs. 50,000 per month. This may differ according to your state.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides average facilities and infrastructure. The boys' hostel is one the best in entire Maharashtra. Separate restrooms are available in every room. There are two students per room. There are two beds and mattresses. Geysers for hot hot water are also present in the hostel.
content.Faculty: The curriculum and faculty members in almost all the medical colleges are quite similar. You have to focus on self-study. We have 2 informative exams, 1 prelims, and 1 university exam. Our faculty members are very helpful and approachable. They help us whenever needed.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I'm very satisfied with my college infrastructure because it has air conditioning.

content.Placements: To get admission into MBBS, one competitive exam is held, the NEET, which we have to qualify for. There are lacs of students who participate, and thousands get selected. Our batch strength is 80; we are currently studying; after 4.5 years, we get into an internship, where we get the salary.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very nice. The new building is in construction as there is no adequate space to cover UG, PG, and hospital at one site. Hospital and college are at the same place, which provides us with knowledge of theory and also practical.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a dream college of every medical student.

content.Placements: I am a student of the 2018 batch of RGMC and CSMH, Thane, studying MBBS 3rd year. Students after giving NEET exam, the eligibility criteria is above 580 marks in NEET, and based on the merit list, a college is allocated to students. After the final year, students get an internship.
content.Infrastructure: The college building is of 3 floors, of which the ground floor has a hospital. The first floor is for the hospital and academic section. The second floor is for physiology, anatomy, microbiology, FMT PSM pathology and pharmacology. A student council is also available.

reviews_list.review_title: My brief review on Kurnool Medical College.

review_content.Placements: Award postings at the government hospital are implement for all the students from 2nd year thus the students gain sufficient clinical knowledge. The final year students once passed out are eligible for internship in the hospital and gain much more clinical knowledge about various treatment procedures and medications. Each student in internship gets around 30,000 rupees every month. Once the internship complete the students are asked to take the PG NEET exam.
review_content.Infrastructure: As it is a government college the infrastructure is okayish and needs to be improved. It will be good if some blocks are renovated. There are so many departments in the college such as anatomy, physiology, biochemistry, pathology, microbiology, pharmacology, forensic, community medicine and other clinical departments such as ophthalmic, ENT, surgery etc. All the departments are situated at different blocks respectively. Hostel: There are 2 hostels for boys and girls respectively. The hostel rooms are spacious with attached bathrooms and other required facilities. The infrastructure of hostel buildings is a bit better at girls hostels when compared to boys hostels. Food at the hostel is very good with a lot of varieties on menu everyday. The mess fee is approximately 5000 rupees every month. A lot of sports can be played such as basketball, cricket, badminton, table tennis etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: For locals, this college is good.

review_content.Placements: Around 40 percent of students were placed last year in MBBS, with the highest package of 15 Lacs and an average of 6 Lacs. Only top scorers or performers got placement in good medical institutions and hospitals. In the last year of the course, compulsory placement happens for all students.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in college, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a huge library, medical rooms, mess, and canteen with cheap and hygienic food. There is a big infrastructure and ground. Sports facilities are good and average. The college is divided into many departments.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Kurnool Medical College has developed very well and has better infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in our college but it is compulsory to do an internship one year after the final year. In an internship, a 23 thousand per month salary was given. There was no recruitment in our course. After internship, we have to write a NEET exam to qualify PG.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are very helpful to gain subjects very easily. We are provided with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, projectors, etc. All these things are very helpful to understand the subject knowledge very easily. Labs are also very helpful and we understand the concept they teach us .

overview_faqs.question: Is Kurnool Medical College, Kurnool a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Kurnool Medical College, Kurnool is a renowned institution offering M.Sc, PG Diploma, MD, MS, DM, M.Ch, MBBS. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Kurnool Medical College, Kurnool boasts an impressive review rating of 3.92 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4.11 for Campus Life, 3.52 for Placements, 4.46 for Faculty, and 3.41 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Kurnool Medical College,Kurnool Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really good facilities and academic.

content.Placements: Placement percentage in our course was around 60-70%. The placement in our course was not very significant. Hospital organised separate exam for recruitment. Top package offered was 40 LPA. Average package was around 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Narayana Health, Apollo, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Labs were well maintained and arranged with all the required equipment. Library was available on the college campus. Hostel quality was good. Limited sports facility was present.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it offers the best package for MBBS.

content.Placements: Most students who seek admission take the MBBS course. Most of my friends who are in contact are earning well, and I am earning almost 15 LPA while working in a government hospital in West Bengal. Role offered is like a doctor. It’s a course, so there are no internships or placements, but most of students are doing well and learning effectively.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities for our course are fantastic. There is 24X7 Wi-Fi provided, along with a water filter and coffee machines for students. Hostel facilities are also good. There are two students in each hostel room, and charges are minimal. The quality of canteen food is good, and we also get three meals in the canteen.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My brief review on Kurnool Medical College.

content.Placements: Award postings at the government hospital are implement for all the students from 2nd year thus the students gain sufficient clinical knowledge. The final year students once passed out are eligible for internship in the hospital and gain much more clinical knowledge about various treatment procedures and medications. Each student in internship gets around 30,000 rupees every month. Once the internship complete the students are asked to take the PG NEET exam.
content.Infrastructure: As it is a government college the infrastructure is okayish and needs to be improved. It will be good if some blocks are renovated. There are so many departments in the college such as anatomy, physiology, biochemistry, pathology, microbiology, pharmacology, forensic, community medicine and other clinical departments such as ophthalmic, ENT, surgery etc. All the departments are situated at different blocks respectively. Hostel: There are 2 hostels for boys and girls respectively. The hostel rooms are spacious with attached bathrooms and other required facilities. The infrastructure of hostel buildings is a bit better at girls hostels when compared to boys hostels. Food at the hostel is very good with a lot of varieties on menu everyday. The mess fee is approximately 5000 rupees every month. A lot of sports can be played such as basketball, cricket, badminton, table tennis etc.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: For locals, this college is good.

content.Placements: Around 40 percent of students were placed last year in MBBS, with the highest package of 15 Lacs and an average of 6 Lacs. Only top scorers or performers got placement in good medical institutions and hospitals. In the last year of the course, compulsory placement happens for all students.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in college, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a huge library, medical rooms, mess, and canteen with cheap and hygienic food. There is a big infrastructure and ground. Sports facilities are good and average. The college is divided into many departments.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Kurnool Medical College has developed very well and has better infrastructure.

content.Placements: There are no placements in our college but it is compulsory to do an internship one year after the final year. In an internship, a 23 thousand per month salary was given. There was no recruitment in our course. After internship, we have to write a NEET exam to qualify PG.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are very helpful to gain subjects very easily. We are provided with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, projectors, etc. All these things are very helpful to understand the subject knowledge very easily. Labs are also very helpful and we understand the concept they teach us .

reviews.review_heading: Experiences of UG in a medical college.
reviews.review_text: In our hostel,  more wifi boxes are there; even in our mess, there is wifi. To study, libraries and reading rooms are present. Mess food is very tasty and healthy to eat. On the hostel grounds, cricket, shuttle and basketball courts are present.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good teachers, a good environment for study purposes, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is somewhat good in my college. Wi-Fi is available, and the labs and classrooms are equipped with projectors and CCTV cameras. The college has 19 departments with highly experienced faculty, and the postgraduates are helpful during training. The class environment is very good. The hostel facilities are also good, with Wi-Fi and a nice mess. There are courts and nets for cricket, and the hostel has a good environment for studying. The hostel expenses are 5,000 per month.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best State government college in AP to study MBBS. It’s very old and needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: Basic facilities are provided by the government as it is a government medical college. There are good and well-equipped labs in each department. There is a college ground for the students. The classrooms are spacious and do have the capacity to accommodate 250 students. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel.

reviews.review_text: All the facilities are provided by the college, and the infrastructure is good. The college library is a pool of all the best books and has all the accessibility and requirements. The facilities and technological provisions are very good. Every year, a sports tournament is conducted in which all the students participate and enjoy themselves together. The food in the hostel is very good, and a...

reviews.review_heading: The college is good having good placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is old but not too bad. Mess and hostel facilities are okay. Sports and games sector is developing. The classrooms have Wi-Fi availability and PPTs are on point. Virtual studying has developed more in the past years. The hostel food is fresh and rooms are regularly cleaned.

reviews.review_heading: I love my college and I am very happy with it.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are nice in our college. The food facilities are also okay. We receive excellent quality of food here in our hostel and the mess manager is very cooperative. I am very happy with the mess and hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best medical colleges in our state.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Wi-Fi is provided on the campus. Labs are provided, classrooms are big. Hostel facilities are good. They provide food, electricity, Wi-Fi, rooms, etc. Medical facilities are available in a medical cell or room. Sports and cultural events are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are not bad and the college has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. The lab facilities are good. The college is cleaned every day and frequently. The students get to handle some cases (patients). Treatments will be given to the patients by the students under the faculty’s guidance. All types of equipments required are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kurnool Medical College, Kurnool.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are good; all facilities are provided. The B.Ed rooms ensure that every student has separate beds with attached bathrooms. The food is good, and a canteen is also available on the campus. The classrooms are neat, and the labs are well-equipped with enabled Wi-Fi.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Institute of Pharmacy, Jalpaiguri as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, it is worth to consider Institute of Pharmacy, Jalpaiguri as a good institute as it is a well-known college for BPharma and DPharma courses. The college offers a wide range of programmes at the UG level in Medicine & Health Sciences stream. Further, the Institute of Pharmacy, Jalpaiguri courses are AICTE-approved and are offered to students in full-time mode. These programs are delivered by well-experienced faculty.

review_summary.college_name: Institute of Pharmacy, Jalpaiguri Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college. Placements are good and the faculty members are also helpful.

content.Placements: 80% of students get placed after passing out from this college. After passing out from this college, many students get placed outside of India like America, Spain, Netherlands, etc. The highest package offered is 15 LPA and the lowest salary is Rs. 30,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good. The library is also good. Labs are good, and different types of facilities are available in this college. The infrastructure is good in this college. The hostel quality and environment are also good. It is good for studies. Food is also good in this hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It gives an enjoyable college life.

content.Placements: Most of the students were good at their studies. Companies didn't visit our college for placements during our batch.
content.Infrastructure: It had a very good campus but needed a bit of maintenance. Lectures were held in classrooms. Our college doesn't provide Wi-Fi and the mobile network was below average. It had a canteen that served food for students and teachers.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college were very helpful and well-qualified with master's degrees or Ph.D. Their teaching was very good. Exams were not tough. Teachers provided all the required material for exams.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: That's enough I think, so give WBJEE examination and come to this college through counselling.

content.Placements: Basically in D. Pharma placement percentage is very low but in B. Pharma it's quite good. 60% students placed in various Pharma companies after their graduation. So I think IOPJ is quite good and it's old pharmacy college in India. Cipla and others visit.
content.Infrastructure: Course infrastructure is not good actually, due to lack to subject teachers, students are facing problems with various pharma subjects. B. pharma hostel available but d. Pharma hostel is unavailable. College canteen facility available but I think it charges high.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: A complete government course for studying pharmacy at extremely low cost.

content.Placements: Institute does not provide placements to Diploma students, but in Bachelors degree, Sun Pharma, Cipla etc. visit here. Mainly Cipla comes for placements. So, no placements by the college in Diploma. But I have seen some of my seniors get there interviews done after passing out.
content.Infrastructure: As it’s the first Diploma in pharmacy college, the main building is quite old, there are labs for each subject, on various small buildings, three gallery and Wi-Fi is available. Diploma in pharmacy hostel has been destroyed in 2019, since then, the hostel facility of Diploma students is abolished. However, there are various paying guests near the college. There is a big playground besides the college and district hospital, Jalpaiguri.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Institute of pharmacy jalpaiguri a good opportunity for your future.

content.Placements: There are 60-70% students getting a lot of opportunities through off camps and on campus. Sun Pharma, Cipla, Also Lupin Pharma etc. companies visit here. Also lots of opportunities we get from Sikkim based pharmacy companies. Also we may get marketing jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Only B. pharma hostels are available D. Pharma hostels are not available for this moment due to maintenance purpose. Hostel facilities only available for boys accommodation not quite good enough. Yearly fees of hostel are small amounts, food facilities are available only for b. pharma boys students.

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for K.M. Shah Dental College and Hospital admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: K.M. Shah Dental College and Hospital offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG stage, courses available include BDS and UG Diploma. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like MDS. KMS Shah Dental fee structure ranges between INR 84,000 to 28,50,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: There are absolutely satisfying teachers and good placements for many years.

review_content.Placements: About 61% of the students from our batch got placed. The average salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month. Doctor and surgeon are the roles offered in our course. The salary package offered in our course is 4 LPA. About 250 students got internships from K M Shah Dental College.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available for students, and the labs have the best infrastructure. Facilities are good, and the classrooms are well maintained with the air-conditioning system. The quality of the facilities, food and sports facilities provided in the hostel is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Honest review of my graduation days.

review_content.Placements: 64 students in a batch! No packages or recruitment after passing out, but connections are everything. If you have good connections with the faculty, they will guide you in the in the right direction to either open your own practice or care about your career plans and give you relatable advice.
review_content.Infrastructure: - very huge, lush green play grounds and nice facilities for sports, including a swimming pool (not yet functional), a volleyball court, basketball courts, a tennis court, a football and cricket play area. Annually, festivals are organised and are fun. Hostels are decent. Backlash serves jain food during jain festivals.

individual_reviews.title: There are absolutely satisfying teachers and good placements for many years.

content.Placements: About 61% of the students from our batch got placed. The average salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month. Doctor and surgeon are the roles offered in our course. The salary package offered in our course is 4 LPA. About 250 students got internships from K M Shah Dental College.

table.details: DBRA University Agra, Agra University, Bhim Rao University

college_info.intro:
DBRA University Agra, through its constituent colleges, affiliated colleges, campus colleges, and departments, offers various UG and PG courses. At the UG level, DBRA University Agra offers BA LLB, BSc, BA, BCom, BBA, BE/ BTech and BPharm courses. Whereas, at the PG level, the university offers the MA, MSc, MCom, MTech, and MBA courses.
MBA and BSc courses offered at DBRA University Agra are really popular among students. DBRAU Agra offers the BSc course in various specialisations such as Botany, Zoology, Chemistry, Mathematics, Physics, and Geology, etc. The university offers admission to BSc based on score of the candidates in Class 12 examination. Through its Department of Business Management, Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra offers the MBA programme. It is a two-year, full-time programme that consists of four semesters. The university accepts the scores of the CUET-PG exam for admission to its MBA programme. The various specialisations offered in the Agra University MBA course include:

faqs.answer: A:    DBRAU B.E is an undegraduate degree programme in the stream of engineering. It is considered equivalent to a BTech degree. To be eligible to pursue a Bachelor of Engineering (B.E) programme at DBRAU, candidates must have passed Class 12 with relevant Science subjects. However, the admission is not based on Class 12 merit. It is based on CUET UG or JEE Main scores, followed by UPTAC counselling. In case a candidate fails to secure a seat for a B.E at DBRAU, they can pursue a B.E/BTech at other universities or institutes. They can also check out the colleges offering online BTech courses.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the college and its infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: All the students get placed depending on what they are doing. If they study up to MD, they will surely earn in lakhs per month. All the students who passed the university exam in the 4th year got internships, and those who passed the university exam got almost a 10k stipend per month. My college is offering a BHMS degree, and there is a hospital also in my college for patients, which is almost free in medicine and consultation because it's government-run.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is almost good, but there is no Wi-Fi and no air conditioning. However, there is a lot of greenery and a quiet, healthy environment. There are separate boys' and girls' hostels, and the hostel is shared, but the cleanliness is very poor in the girls' hostel. I don't know about the boys' hostel, but in the girls' hostel, dogs are roaming around, and the bathroom is also not cleaned regularly. The canteen is also not so good, and there are no sports or games in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a decent college, but it does not offer the highest package placements.

content.Placements: My college has good placements. Mostly, students who have good skills get placed, and even those who put in a little hard work are easily able to get placed. The average package is 3–4 LPA. Mostly, students are placed in non-tech companies. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, etc.
content.Infrastructure: My course department has decent infrastructure. We have Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library, and everything works fine. There are no hostel facilities provided inside this college. All basic medical facilities are available. We have proper grounds for outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027

content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good but not bad. Outside the college, there are many shops you can check. Sports and games are also very good. The college and hostel are strictly focused on studies. Classrooms are good according to experience, and the library is fabulous. Go and see.

individual_reviews.title: My experience is very bad at this college.

content.Placements: College placement was very bad. No one was placed in a good company or field. College management was too careless and responsible for students’ work.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities were very basic with hygienic water. The college campus was very dirty and dusty. There were no full water facilities. Wi-Fi was not available. No labs, canteen, medical facilities, sports, or games facilities were available. The college campus was very basic with no additional facilities provided. The college location was very out of town with no convenient way to reach.

admission_overview.title: DBRAU Agra Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: DBRAU Agra, formerly known as Agra University Admission 2025 is entrance as well as merit-based. DBRAU offers over 141 courses at campus and 1051 affiliated colleges at the UG, PG, PG diploma and doctoral levels. The courses are offered through four campuses namely, DBRAU Khandari, DBRAU Paliwal Park, DBRAU Civil Lines and DBRAU Chhalesar in the field of Humanities, Science, Technology, Engineering, Management, etc. Additionally, Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University also offers diploma and certificate courses in Languages such as French, Russian and German.

paragraphs: Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra admission process details are mentioned below:

Students are selected for counselling basis CUET score. Admission to a particular University will depend on CUET Rank. The counselling process is online. BRAU CUET counselling includes various important points:
Before appearing for the CUET for admission to BRAU UG programs, Students should follow these points:
Students should take CUET 2025 only in subjects they have passed in Class 12.
To become eligible for admission through CUET 2025, students should pass the Class 12 exam.
National Testing Agency organizes CUET UG 2025 exam.
CUET 2025 exam includes three sections with MCQs. The syllabus is based on Class 12 NCERT syllabus.
Students appearing for CUET 2025 can choose from a total of 13 languages including Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Gujarati, Odiya, Bengali, Assamese, Punjabi, English, Hindi and Urdu.

courses_data.name: DBRAU BTech 2025 Admission
courses_data.description: The Engineering Institute of Technology at DBRAU's Khandari campus gives a BTech program with three specializations. Admission to this BTech program for the 2024 intake is decided by scores from CUET or JEE Mains. The Bachelor of Engineering (BE) is an undergraduate academic degree in the field of engineering, and DBRAU (Dr Bhim Rao Ambedkar University), situated in Uttar Pradesh, India, gives BE with specializations encompassing disciplines like Mechanical, Electronic Communication Engineering, and Computer Science Engineering.

faqs.question: I've scored less than 50% in 12th boards, can I get admission in DBRAU for B.E?
faqs.answer: DBRAU B.E is an undegraduate degree programme in the stream of engineering. It is considered equivalent to a BTech degree. To be eligible to pursue a Bachelor of Engineering (B.E) programme at DBRAU, candidates must have passed Class 12 with relevant Science subjects. However, the admission is not based on Class 12 merit. It is based on CUET UG or JEE Main scores, followed by UPTAC counselling. In case a candidate fails to secure a seat for aB.E at DBRAU, they can pursue a B.E/BTech at other uni

courses_data.description: Dr. Bhim Rao Ambedkar University offers MA for two-years. The university offers MA in 12 specialisations at the campus and via its affiliated colleges. Candidates are selected for MA based on their merit. Aspirants who have completed their UG degree with at least 45% aggregate can apply for MA.

faqs.question: I have scored less than 50% in graduation. Can I get admission for M.A in DBRAU?
faqs.answer: DBRAU offers MA as a two-year postgraduate programme offered in the full-time mode. To get admission to the MA course at DBRAU, students need to fulfill eligibility criteria. A candidate scoring a minimum of 45% in graduation is eligible to apply for MA admission at the university. Hence, a candidate scoring less that 50% in their graduation degree can apply for the programme. Candidates scoring less than 45% in graduation can check out other colleges offeringonline MA courses.

placement_data.title: DBRAU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year and UG 4-year DBRAU placements 2023 stood at INR 1.8 LPA and INR 3.86 LPA , respectively. Other than this, the median package offered during DBRAU PG 1-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 1.8 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: With increasing admission intake at DBRAU Agra, how will it impact the placements for outstation students, considering the cost and ROI?
faqs.answer: Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra has consistently witnessed good placement numbers. As per the Shiksha verified reviews the 65% to 85% of the students were placed in UG course . The highest package is INR 15-20 LPA , the average package is INR 6-7 LPA and the lowest package is INR 2-3 LPA . The top recruiters included Infosys, Tata Motors, Sonalika, Wipro, Tech, HCL, BHEL, and others. The increased admission intake has not affected the ROI of the university. In 2023, the median package stood at INR 6 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: What are the course fees for the MBA at DBRAU Agra?
faqs.answer: Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra Master of Business Administrative (MBA) total tuition fee is INR 1.3 lakh (for 1 year-3 years). The students must qualify for the UPCET entrance exam to apply for admission to the MBA course at Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra. DBRAU MBA course is offered for a duration of one to three years. Candidates need to fulfil the eligibility criteria to be able to apply for the course. The MBA eligibility criteria is that the candidate must have a bachelors degree with a minimum of 50% in aggregate.

faqs.question: What is the total BTech fee at DBRAU Agra for 2025?
faqs.answer: DBRAU Agra BTech total fees 2025 can cost anywhere between INR 1.65 Lakh to INR 2.8 lakh . It includes tuition fees, hostel fees and admission charges. Students also pay a one-time fee of INR 8,000. Please note that fees are subject to changes. Please refer to the official website, whenever in doubt.

faqs.question: What are the additional costs, such as accommodation, food, and books to be paid at DBRAU Agra?
faqs.answer: In addition to the basic course fee , students will have to pay the examination fee and annual fee. The other additional costs include hostel charges, mess charges, and others. Students must duly pay all fee before the last date to avoid the late charges. Also, the seats will be confirmed only when the students pay the DBRAU Agra course fee in full.

description: DBRAU Agra cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BE/BTech course across multiple specialisations. The cutoff is provided as opening and closing ranks for different categories under the Home State quota. Candidates can refer to the sections below to view Dr. Bhimrao Ambedkar University (DBRAU), Agra UPTAC cutoff 2025 across different rounds and categories. A few more updates are below:

DBRAU JEE Main Cutoff 2026 will be available after the results get announced. Until then students can refer to the table below to see the DBRAU JEE Main Cutoff 2024 for BE, which was concluded after several rounds of the Seat Allotment Result. According to the DBRAU BTech cutoff 2024, the Round 1 closing ranks for B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering stood at 327178, for B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, the cutoff was at 559203 and for B.E. in Mechanical Engineering at 1352

DBRAU BE Cutoff 2024 was based on candidates' performance in the JEE Mains, followed by counselling. The cutoff has been concluded for different categories under the HS Quota. BE in CSE was the toughest course of all, as per their last-round cutoff. As per JEE Main cutoff 2024, the last round closing rank stood at 520157 for the BE in Computer Science & Engineering course, for the General HS quota candidates. For 2023 and 2022, DBRAU's last round closing cutoff for BE in Computer Science &am

According to the table below, we can say that the cutoff for admission was 926018 in Round 4 closing ranks for the General HS category students.

DBRAU CUET PG Cutoff 2024 can be seen in the table given below for different rounds. The 2024 cutoff for the General Home State female category was 10365 in the first and last round for admission to the MCA course. DBRAU NEET PG Cutoff 2025 is out till Round 2 for candidates seeking admission to this university for its MD courses. reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by State Pt. J.L.N. Homeo. Medical CollegeReviewed on 15 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college and its infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is almost good, but there is no Wi-Fi and no air conditioning. However, there is a lot of greenery and a quiet, healthy environment. There are separate boys' and girls' hostels, and the hostel is shared, but the cleanliness is very poor in the girls' hostel. I don't know about the boys' hostel, but in the girls' hostel, dogs are roaming around, and the bathroom is also not cleaned regularly. The canteen is also not so good, and there are no sports or games in the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by St. John's College, AgraReviewed on 3 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college, but it does not offer the highest package placements.
reviews.review_text: My course department has decent infrastructure. We have Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library, and everything works fine. There are no hostel facilities provided inside this college. All basic medical facilities are available. We have proper grounds for outdoor games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by St. John's College, AgraReviewed on 5 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Placement is not guaranteed, but faculty is good, not bad.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good but not bad. Outside the college, there are many shops you can check. Sports and games are also very good. The college and hostel are strictly focused on studies. Classrooms are good according to experience, and the library is fabulous. Go and see.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by R.B.S CollegeReviewed on 4 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: There is a very good environment and the campus is very big, so you won't regret taking admission.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very suitable for students. There is a lab with around 30 computers in it. Wi-Fi and camera in every classroom, a fingerprint scanning attendance system.

reviews.review_heading: My experience is very bad at this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were very basic with hygienic water. The college campus was very dirty and dusty. There were no full water facilities. Wi-Fi was not available. No labs, canteen, medical facilities, sports, or games facilities were available. The college campus was very basic with no additional facilities provided. The college location was very out of town with no convenient way to reach.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by S.K.S. Ayurvedic Medical College and HospitalReviewed on 7 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is fine, it could become better in terms of everything.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is decent. Wi-Fi doesn't work there, and neither does the network. Hostels are good, but the food provided by the mess is not so good, it could be healthier. The canteen is just fine. The medical facilities are good, as it is a medical college. There are no such events like sports and games, only 2-3 times a year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by R.B.S CollegeReviewed on 2 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the crowd.
reviews.review_text: Our college has very old infrastructure for the arts faculty, and the rest of the college is good. We need to work a lot on the infrastructure of the college. The infrastructure is good for some departments, like the Engineering and Commerce department classes, which are very old, and everything is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dr. M.P.S.Memorial College of Business StudiesReviewed on 28 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college for graduation.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good, and maintenance is also moderate. However, classrooms need maintenance. Hostels are not present there, but they are regularly working on improvements to the infrastructure. I think, in the future, they will make good changes.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by S.K.S. Ayurvedic Medical College and HospitalReviewed on 10 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: There is a no, from my side, and do good research before entering any college.
reviews.review_text: We don't have Wi-Fi in our college. We have labs, classrooms, and a library is good, there is no air conditioning, and the remaining infrastructure is ok. The hostel is good, security is ok, the mess food is ok, and the canteen food is not so hygienic, and the taste is only ok. If I talk about the medical facility, they didn't give us the cadaver either, we have not seen a cadaver till now in our college, when I am in my 2nd year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Rajiv Academy for Technology and ManagementReviewed on 3 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent environment, good placement.
reviews.review_text: Various facilities are available, like a cool environment, an AC cafeteria, perfect teachers, and support from everyone. Quality of the products is much better. As during the lectures, none of the students is irritated because of the hot climate. In computer lab, perfect Wi-Fis is available so students can get many benefits.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Rajiv Academy for Technology and ManagementReviewed on 31 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Better environment, disciplined teachers, amazing campus, and too much helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college has totally AC rooms, pure water, and amazing environment too. Staff members are amazing and they are impressive. There is a garden with flowers and plants. Campus is too much beautiful.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Uttam Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 24 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: In short, I would like to say that those who want to get admission in a good college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities they provide us are AC classes, free Wi-Fi, and good quality canteen food. E-library, Medical facilities for girls, a special room is available. Sports facilities. Bus facilities are provided by them, which comes under the fee structure, we dont have to pay extra for this.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Institute of Information Management and Technology, AligarhReviewed on 12 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are so good. There are also good placement and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, classrooms, and library are okay. But there are no labs. But there are so many Wi-Fi facilities in different places and for different purposes. Library is so big, and it is also well arranged. Librarian also provide library books for home also.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Uttam Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 6 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am very dissatisfied with the college placement, as it is zero.
reviews.review_text: Overall college experience is affected by poor infrastructure and limited facilities. The biggest drawback of the college is its small campus. The building is very compact and lacks enough space for students to feel comfortable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Uttam Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 6 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty and good infrastructure, but weak placements for B.Com.
reviews.review_text: I pursued B.Com (2022-2025 batch) at Uttam Group of Institutions, Agra, and my overall experience with the college infrastructure was satisfactory and well-maintained, especially considering the affordable fee structure. Classrooms: The classrooms are clean, spacious, and well-lit. Most rooms have whiteboards and fans. Some classrooms are equipped with projectors or smart boards, especially for final-year students. Library: The library is decent in size with a good collection of commerce-related...

description: Muzaffarnagar Medical College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Muzaffarnagar Medical College NEET UG cutoff 2024 has been announced for admission to the MBBS course. The institute offers admission to the MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery course based on candidates’ performance in the NEET UG exam. Eligible candidates are then called for the counselling rounds for final admission. During the Muzaffarnagar Medical College 2024 cut off, the last round closing rank for MBBS admission was 106735. For more information, refer to the table b

As per the Muzaffarnagar Medical College MBBS cutoff 2024, the last round closing rank was 106735 for the General HS category students. The cutoff for the same course was 196918 in 2023 and 195391 in 2022 for admission. So, analysing the cutoff trends over three years, MBBS saw inconsistency in its last-round closing ranks for the students belonging to the General HS category.

Muzaffarnagar Medical College accepts NEET UG scores for admission to the MBBS course. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the important NEET UG dates for admission to Muzaffarnagar Medical College.

reviews.review_heading: Journey of MBBS at Muzaffarnagar medical college .
reviews.review_text: Departments are well-equipped with the latest technology and Wi-Fi. Labs are also equipped. Hostel rooms have two-person accommodations with attached washrooms in each room. Mess food is good. We have courts for different games like basketball, badminton and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: There are infrastructural facilities and services that provide U2728. The college has a huge campus with a green touch as well. The labs are different for each department. The campus has Wi-Fi for students, teachers, and visitors separately. The hostel rooms are great. Excellent hygiene and mess food.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing college life here.
reviews.review_text: Top notch. It is among the top medical colleges in UP, so the infrastructure is also like that. The campus is fully equipped with Wi-Fi and air conditioning. The hostels are no less than hotels. The full is amazing and hygienic too. I'm loving it here.

reviews.review_heading: Loving this college so far .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is undoubtedly great. It has a lot of facilities. The entire campus is air-conditioned. The campus is also Wi-Fi-equipped. The hostel life is great for both boys and girls. We have a separate mess, and complete security and safety are maintained for the students too.

reviews.review_heading: Top UP college in Medical.
reviews.review_text: The college has very spacious and grand premises. It has all the amenities and facilities. The college boasts a vast portfolio of infrastructure, like laboratories, auditoriums, playgrounds, basketball courts, gyms, mess, canteens, hostels and more.

reviews.review_heading: Great hostel and mess food.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great here. The hostel is top-notch. It has all the hygiene and sanitation facilities at their finest. There are different hostels for both girls and boys. And has separate gyms and mess too. The mess food is tasty. A hostel is mandatory. The entire campus, including hostels and mess, is air-conditioned and Wi-Fi-equipped.

reviews.review_heading: Very nice college for MBBS .
reviews.review_text: We have two gyms, a hostel, and a mess for boys and girls separately. The hostels are safe and secure. Guards are always on duty to safeguard. The hostel food, rooms and rent are all worth the money. The rooms and classrooms are also air-conditioned. We have many labs, departments and seminar halls as well.

reviews.review_heading: Top college of UP for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. It is a grand and huge medical college with all the facilities on its campus. The hostel food, rooms and rent are all worth the money. The rooms and classrooms are also air-conditioned. We have many labs, departments and seminar halls as well.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great medical college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is undoubtedly up to par. It has different hostels, gyms and messes for both boys and girls. The hostel rooms are very spacious and air-conditioned. We have a playground, basketball court, auditorium, canteen, and library.

reviews.review_heading: Very nice college for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. The hostel is there for both boys and girls. Availing a hostel is mandatory. There are different gyms and messes for girls and boys. Other amenities include a library, laboratories, playground, canteen, and air-conditioned classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The college boasts a vast infrastructural portfolio. It has dedicated hostels and gyms, separately for girls and boys. The rooms are very lavish and has all water and hygiene facilities. It has playgrounds, a basketball court, auditorium and a canteen as well.

reviews.review_heading: 30th college ranking for MBBS in UP.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great and boasts a number of amenities and facilities. It has all the requirements for students like auditorium, labs, classrooms, parking, playgrounds, mess, canteens, etc. Everything is air-conditioned and the campus is also equipped with Wi-Fi system.

reviews.review_heading: Great college to be at for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The college is updated with modern and impressive infrastructure. The campus has Wi-Fi all around; the rooms, classrooms and labs are all air-conditioned. There are separate gyms and hostels for boys and girls. The mess floor is very tasty and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Great place to be at! 100/10.
reviews.review_text: The college is adorned with ample facilities and amenities. We have a gym, hostel, playground, canteen, mess, auditorium, and labs. There are separate hostels and gyms for both boys and girls. The campus is air-conditioned. And the mess food is also very tasty.

reviews.review_heading: Great college for MBBS in UP.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is amazing. We have air-conditioned labs, classrooms and even hostels. The hostels are for both boys and girls inside the campus itself. The mess food is really, really good. The hostel rooms are also very spacious and have attached washrooms too.

reviews_list.review_title: All about Kamla Nehru, Sultanpur.

review_content.Placements: In LL.B., there are no such placements. I can't say about the highest, lowest, or average placement as there is no placement. Students are recurated by local advocates. Every student has to do an internship, which they can get by their own contact; you have to visit the door.
review_content.Infrastructure: The faculty is pretty good and has knowledge about subjects. The faculty will always be there for you in difficult situations. Infrastructure is also good. The college has a good lab but does not have Wi-Fi facilities, which they lack. The quality of the hostel is pretty good and easy to live in.

reviews_list.review_title: My college facilities are good.

review_content.Placements: My college placement is very poor, with only 30 percent of students placed in my course. A top recruiting company like SEED Technologies offered jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college facility is good but the infrastructure is not good and the very poor infrastructure of my college building is not well maintained. The Wi-Fi speed is good and there is a small gym in my college. All classroom fans are present but the electricity connection is not good.

Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions has a review rating of 4.3 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.2 on campuslife, 3.9 on placements, 4.5 on faculty and 4.2 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Botany - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are highly qualified and knowledgeable.

content.Placements: Our college provides good opportunities for students. Average students get placed at this college. Students get opportunities in the research and development fields. The average package offered in the college ranges between 4-6 LPA. Students also get internships at the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. College facilities are well-maintained and of good quality. Classrooms are big enough with proper seating. Labs, library, Wi-Fi, and various other facilities are available for the students. Multiple sports facilities are given to the students. Hostel facility is also given to the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is very awesome.

content.Placements: I don't know the exact percentage of students who are placed in a company but at least 150 students get placed under a company every year. The highest package that is offered in my course is around 22 LPA, and the average package is about 6-7 LPA. To be honest, I don't know the company's name, but they are kind of agrochemical companies and they generally belong to Haryana, Gujarat, Assam and Pune. In the government sector, generally people go for a forest officer and food inspector and in private, there are field administrative officers, and many posts are offered by the companies.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (L.L.B.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: All about Kamla Nehru, Sultanpur.

content.Placements: In LL.B., there are no such placements. I can't say about the highest, lowest, or average placement as there is no placement. Students are recurated by local advocates. Every student has to do an internship, which they can get by their own contact; you have to visit the door.
content.Infrastructure: The faculty is pretty good and has knowledge about subjects. The faculty will always be there for you in difficult situations. Infrastructure is also good. The college has a good lab but does not have Wi-Fi facilities, which they lack. The quality of the hostel is pretty good and easy to live in.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college facilities are good.

content.Placements: My college placement is very poor, with only 30 percent of students placed in my course. The highest package is INR 3 lacs per year the lowest package is INR 1 lacs per year and the average package is INR 1.8 lacs per year offered in my course. A top recruiting company like SEED Technologies offered jobs.
content.Infrastructure: My college facility is good but the infrastructure is not good and the very poor infrastructure of my college building is not well maintained. The Wi-Fi speed is good and there is a small gym in my college. All classroom fans are present but the electricity connection is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college faculty members are good.

content.Placements: My college placement is good and 70 percent of students placed in my course. In my course, the highest package is INR 5 lacs per annum the lowest package is INR 2 lacs per annum and the average package is INR 3.8 lacs per annum. The top role in my course is in the agriculture department.
content.Infrastructure: The facility and infrastructure available in my department are good, with good Wi-Fi speed, good labs and classrooms, good painting, and a library available. The quality of facilities in my hostel is good and boys and girls have separate rooms, but the mess is the same.

admission_overview.college_name: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions considers scores in JEE Main, CUET, and CUET-PG for admission to specific courses.Kamla Nehru Group of Institutionsoffers courses at the UG, PG, After 10th and Certificate levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 42 months - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 1 year - 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 19,000 - 3,50,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,22,400 - 1,53,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

faqs.answer: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityBBACandidate must have passed Intermediate/ Higher Secondary from any recognised boards in India.B.Sc.Candidates who have passed 10+2 examination or its equivalent from a recognised board are eligible to apply for the course.M.Sc.The candidates must have passed the graduate level (Third Year) exam with the same subject from a recognised university.B.ComCandidates who have passed 10+2 examination or its equivalent from a recognised board are eligible to apply for the course.M.ComCandidates must have passed the graduate level (Third Year) examination with the same subject from a recognised university or have to pursue a bridge course, in the desired subject.M.A.Candidates must have passed the graduate level (Third Year) examination with the same subject from a recognised university.B.A.Only those students can select Geography who have passed intermediate examination with a

faqs.answer: Courses offerred by Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions are approved by eminent Government bodies like NCTE, AICTE, INC, PCI. The combined seats available for courses offered at Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions goes up to 1595.

cut_off.college_name: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions Cutoff 2025: Check UPTAC Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 563961 and 971998 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engin

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 563961 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 437609 in 2023 and 149705 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated an improving trend

Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. reviews.review_heading: Best college for BDS in Gujarat.
reviews.review_text: Boys hostel is near the college. Girls hostel is also near the college. There is no Wi-Fi. Lab and mess are near the college. It has a decent library system and labeled diagram of maxillary sinus surgery. Volleyball ground floor available in the world to me and volleyball ground floor is available.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is still building. Faculty members are good. It has an enjoyable hostel.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are alright, and we cannot actually see the board if we sit at the back of the class. 2 buildings are already in construction for bigger classrooms and more rooms. Mess food is alright, and it is neither too spicy nor too hot. If we don't like it, we can order a tiffin.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for dentistry.
reviews.review_text: Hostels of Government Dental College and Hospital are among the best in India. Two students are allowed per room. New lecture halls are being created, and the hospital renovation has also started. The college library is open from 9 to 5. Facilities such as a volleyball court, badminton court, table tennis, carrom, chess, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is good when it comes to academics.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is average right now, and construction is ongoing. A new auditorium and lecture halls will be constructed there. The hospital is good, and the hostel is also good. There is a volleyball court, box cricket, badminton court, gym space, and indoor games like TT, carrom, and chess available.

reviews.review_heading: I would suggest that students who want the best experience in this field can opt for this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is also very good, as the hospital part of our college is under renovation, and other parts, such as the classrooms and laboratories, have been newly renovated. All the practice machineries of the college have been newly replaced.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Dental College and Hospital, Ahmedabad.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a library with a Wi-Fi system. The hostel facilities are good. There are separate hostels for boys and girls and a separate library. The hospital is big, and it is on the 8th floor.

reviews.review_heading: It is India's most popular college with good teachers and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. There is 8 floor big hospital in which every department has a separate floor. The hostel is good. Library, Wi-Fi, and good labs. There are separate boys' and girls' hostels with good facilities and infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best teaching staff, and you can become the best dentist.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available from morning 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. There was a huge library with around 3000 books of our course -and post-graduate preparation and for general knowledge. IT also had newspapers like Times of India, Dainik Bhasker, etc. for students to be updated. There were two large classrooms for lectures with a projector and normal board also with a capacity of around 200 students to teach. The main problem was the not availability of canteen on the campus. If we need some snacks, we had to...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to study dentistry.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are nicely constructed with the facility of air-conditioning. The college also contains a well-formed library. The new hostel building has been recently constructed and has all the required facilities. The mess is also hygienic, and the food served also tastes good. Washrooms are also kept clean.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of faculty, good placements, good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in our college are very good. Labs are available for every subject. Lecture rooms are available with a digital connection. There is a huge library. In the hostel, every facility is available. A mess serves food within the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides very good placements.
reviews.review_text: A mess is available in our college. The food served in our college is average. The infrastructure of our college is good. A library is available in our college. It has all books. Labs are the best. All practicals are performed in our college. Each student can stay in each hostel room. Each room has a bed, a desk, a cupboard, etc. Washrooms are cleaned. It is better than other hostels. Students can play many games in our college like cricket, badminton, chess, carrom, and table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members and the curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well equipped with instruments, Spacious classrooms, the library facility for studying is there for students without any extra fees. There are hostel and mess facilities with a very low charge and full sanity. Good quality of food in mess. Medical facilities are there in the campus only as there's a government hospital with a very low amount of charge.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure with best facilities and minimum amount of fees.
reviews.review_text: Every modern instrument is provided by the college for practicals. The canteen is too good. The college provides healthy food at a low price. Only Rs 1700 is charged for lunch, dinner, and breakfast for a month. We get sufficient patients to practice.

review_content.General: I heard from my seniors that hardly anyone gets a job or qualifies for the NEET PG exam, and it costs too much to do your PG from here. Many courses are offered by this college, like BDS (dental), ANM, GNM Nursing, and Paramedical courses. The top roles offered are of HODs of departments.
review_content.Infrastructure: One thing is good, that it has a big cricket stadium, but everything like the hostel and mess is below average. You don't get any Wi-Fi as mentioned on their site, but you can take your own if you want, as they allow Wi-Fi of your own. Food quality is really bad.

reviews_list.review_title: We will prefer people to take admission in this college for studies because the studies in it.

review_content.Placements: I am currently pursuing this course, and I think that the placement from this college is only 10%, and the internship from this college should also be kept at 10% because, as per the condition of the college, no student has received payment from this course. Nor have I found any internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are classrooms and a library in our college, but there is no hostel or arrangement for food. However, the quality of the classrooms is very good, with 2 cameras installed in one room and a good quality voice recorder. This college has medical facilities, but none for games.

reviews_list.review_title: My M.Sc. experience at Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Awadh University.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell did not visit for my course. Being the gold medalist of my subject, I did not get any placement. As no companies arrived, none of the students got placed. We graduated in 2023 and received our degrees the same year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and laboratories were in good condition and up to the mark. Wi-Fi was not available on the campus for students. Sports activities were held every year as part of the annual sports meet. Cultural events also took place from time to time on various occasions.

review_summary.college_name: RMLAU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the facilities.

content.Placements: No placement in this college. In my batch, there were almost 200 students, but there was not a single placement. Placements don't happen in this college. In this college, there was no internship programme, no roles offered by any company to anyone; it was just a graduation.
content.Infrastructure: College has its library. Wi-Fi is not available in the whole college. There was a small canteen also. I don't live in a college hostel, so I can't say anything about that, and I also never had food from the canteen, so I can't say anything about that. They have some sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Campus experience is really good.

content.Placements: Many students are placed in the TCS company and some banking fields, UBS, Kotak Mahindra Bank, State Street, and some other companies. Many students got placed into different service-based companies. As a BCA student, I've seen a lot of alumni who have been shortlisted and got the opportunity to work with these companies. Some of them have been placed into banking fields, and they also prepare for that along with their college studies.
content.Infrastructure: In our library, Wi-Fi facility is available, smart classes are available, and computer labs are available with 24/7 Wi-Fi. I don't live in a hostel, so I can't say more about it, but some students say that the mess food is good, like at home. And all of them get breakfast in the morning and evening.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: Not the good but not the worst.

content.Placements: I heard from my seniors that hardly anyone gets a job or qualifies for the NEET PG exam, and it costs too much to do your PG from here. Many courses are offered by this college, like BDS (dental), ANM, GNM Nursing, and Paramedical courses. The top roles offered are of HODs of departments.
content.Infrastructure: One thing is good, that it has a big cricket stadium, but everything like the hostel and mess is below average. You don't get any Wi-Fi as mentioned on their site, but you can take your own if you want, as they allow Wi-Fi of your own. Food quality is really bad.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: We will prefer people to take admission in this college for studies because the studies in it.

content.Placements: I am currently pursuing this course, and I think that the placement from this college is only 10%, and the internship from this college should also be kept at 10% because, as per the condition of the college, no student has received payment from this course. Nor have I found any internships.
content.Infrastructure: There are classrooms and a library in our college, but there is no hostel or arrangement for food. However, the quality of the classrooms is very good, with 2 cameras installed in one room and a good quality voice recorder. This college has medical facilities, but none for games.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biochemistry - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My M.Sc. experience at Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Awadh University.

content.Placements: The placement cell did not visit for my course. Being the gold medalist of my subject, I did not get any placement. As no companies arrived, none of the students got placed. We graduated in 2023 and received our degrees the same year.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and laboratories were in good condition and up to the mark. Wi-Fi was not available on the campus for students. Sports activities were held every year as part of the annual sports meet. Cultural events also took place from time to time on various occasions.

admission_overview.college_name: RMLAU Course Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fees, Registration, Courses, Application Form, Dates

paragraphs: Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh University orRMLAU admission 2025is both entrance and merit-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such as CUET-PG,JEE Main, etc. for admission to specific courses. The university also conducts an entrance exam for admission to some of the UG and PG courses.RMLAUoffers 93 UG, PG, PGD, vocational, certificate and PhD courses across 20 departments and more than 100 affiliated colleges.

Located in Ayodhya, Uttar Pradesh, Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh University offers courses in full-time mode. Applicants can pursue courses available at UG, PG and doctoral levels. LLB, LLM, MBA are the popular courses of RMLAU. Find the highlights forAvadh University admissionin the section below:
RMLAU Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
UG courses:INR 13,100 - INR 71.1 lakh
PG courses:INR 13,200 - INR 29.7 lakh
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
https://www.rmlau.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh University admissionto most of the courses is entrance-based. Candidates must meet the eligibility criteria of the applied course. The basic eligibility is Class 12 for UG courses, whereas graduation is required for postgraduate programmes. The university also conducts its entrance exam for admission to courses such as LLB, LLM, M.Ed, etc. Below are the topRMLAU coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria
45%-50% aggregate in graduation
As per the norms of BCI
Graduation with at least 45% aggregate
As per the norms of NCTE
B.Ed/ BA B.Ed/ BSc B.Ed/ D.EI.ED/ B.EI.Ed with at least 50% aggregate

RMLAU fee is a sum of multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Some of the fee components are charged one-time, while some have to be paid semester-wise or annually, such as tuition fees. The fee amount further differs depending upon the chosen course or specialisation. Check belowDr. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh University feefor top courses:
Download:RMLAU Course-wise Eligibility 2024
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

RMLAU intake varies course-wise. Candidates can get a seat in the university based on their merit in the last qualifying exam or entrance exam. Out of the total intake, some seats are reserved for SC, ST, EWS and OBC-NCL categories. Check belowDr. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh University seatsfor some of the popular courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh University reserves some seats for special category students. The reservation is available for theDifferently Abled, Dependent of Freedom Fighters, Ex. Servicemen, Kargil Shaheed,Kashmiri Migrants and EWS. Some of the Kargil Heros are Captain Vikram Batra, Captain Manoj Kumar Pandey, Grenadier Yogendra Singh Yadav, and Lieutenant Balwan Singh.The reservation details are shown in the table below:

Aspirants meeting the eligibility criteria can begin theDr. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh University Ayodhya admission processwith registration. Below is the step-wise admission process for Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh University:
Step 1: Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh University Application Process

Candidates can fill out the application form online for the choice of the RMLAU programme. For courses where admission is through a national-level entrance exam, candidates must first register for the exam.
Step 2: Selection Process

RMLAU admission to most of the UG and PG courses such as M.Ed, LLM, BPharm, BA LLB, etc. is based on the entrance exam conducted by the university. RMLAU releases the results for the entrance exam on the official website of the university. Candidates can check their results by providing their roll number and date of birth.
Step 3: Counselling & Seat Allotment
Once the entrance exam results are out, shortlisted aspirants are called for counselling. Selected aspirants need to pay theRMLAU feeto confirm their seats in the university.
Shortlisted candidates need to report before the reporting time with the following documents:

Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh University provides education in arts, science, law, culture, history, rural development, physics, mathematics, MBA and other popular streams. The university delivers the programmes through 600 affiliated colleges and other residential departments. Below are RMLAU's top courses along with the affiliated colleges offering them:

courses_data.name: RMLAU LLB Admission 2025
courses_data.description: LLB is a three-year course divided into six semesters. Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh University offers the LLB at the PG level. Candidates who have completed graduation with at least 45% aggregate can apply for Dr. Manohar Lohia Avadh University Ayodhya LLB course.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for LLB at RMLAU?
faqs.answer: RMLAU eligibility of LLB is as per the norms of BCI. Aspirants who have completed graduation with at least 45% aggregate (42% aggregate for OBC and 40% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for RMLAU LLB programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification.

faqs.question: Does RMLAU conducts entrance exam for LLB?
faqs.answer: Yes, Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh University conducts an offline entrance exam of two hours to select candidates for LLB programme. The test paper consists of 100 objective type questions with multiple choice answers relating to English Language, HindiLanguage Comprehension, Analytical Abilities, Legal Awareness & Aptitude, IndianPolity and General Knowledge.

faqs.question: Is LLB available at RMLAU?
faqs.answer: Yes, Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh University offers three-year LLM programme spread across six semesters. The university offers admission to LLB based on entrance exam. RMLAU conducts offline entrance exam of two hours to selects candidates. Besides, aspirants need to complete graduation with at least 45% aggregate (42% aggregate for OBC and 40% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for LLB.

faqs.question: What is the last date for filling CUET application form?
faqs.answer: National Testing Agency re-commenced CUET 2026 registration on February 23, 2026. Soon after the release of the CUET notification, candidates can check the important dates about CUET 2026. The last date for CUET 2026 registration was February 26, 2026 (11.50 PM). Candidates were required to fill the CUET application form within the given time frame, failing which no request for extension of the CUET registration last date will be entertained. NTA does not provide the window for late fee payment. CUET 2026 application process is in online mode. No physical copies of the CUET application form must be sent to the authorities.
