description: RMLAU cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about RMLAU UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The RMLAU cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the RMLAU BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 287691 and 1247894 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering. The first round cutoff rank for the same stood

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BTech specialization with a closing rank of 287691 for the General HS quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 206669 in 2022.

Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh University accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to RMLAU can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

RMLAU NEET UG Cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the BDS and MBBS courses for various categories under the Home State quota. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks till 4 rounds.

For the General HS category, the BDS cutoff in the last round was 190594. On the other hand, the MBBS course had a cutoff of 608611. This difference in the ranks signifies that the competition for the BDS course is higher than the MBBS course.

As per the RMLAU BDS cutoff 2025, the last round rank was 190594. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoff was 694731 and 682166, respectively for the General HS quota candidates. After analysing these ranks, we can conclude that the competition for this category for the BDS course has been fluctuating over the years.
To know the cutoff for other courses, categories, rounds, etc., use the filters in the table below.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Kisan P.G. CollegeReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the facilities.
reviews.review_text: College has its library. Wi-Fi is not available in the whole college. There was a small canteen also. I don't live in a college hostel, so I can't say anything about that, and I also never had food from the canteen, so I can't say anything about that. They have some sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Campus experience is really good.
reviews.review_text: In our library, Wi-Fi facility is available, smart classes are available, and computer labs are available with 24/7 Wi-Fi. I don't live in a hostel, so I can't say more about it, but some students say that the mess food is good, like at home. And all of them get breakfast in the morning and evening.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Career Institute of Medical Sciences and HospitalReviewed on 23 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Not the good but not the worst.
reviews.review_text: One thing is good, that it has a big cricket stadium, but everything like the hostel and mess is below average. You don't get any Wi-Fi as mentioned on their site, but you can take your own if you want, as they allow Wi-Fi of your own. Food quality is really bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Shyam Manohar Degree CollegeReviewed on 13 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: We will prefer people to take admission in this college for studies because the studies in it.
reviews.review_text: There are classrooms and a library in our college, but there is no hostel or arrangement for food. However, the quality of the classrooms is very good, with 2 cameras installed in one room and a good quality voice recorder. This college has medical facilities, but none for games.

reviews.review_heading: My M.Sc. experience at Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Awadh University.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and laboratories were in good condition and up to the mark. Wi-Fi was not available on the campus for students. Sports activities were held every year as part of the annual sports meet. Cultural events also took place from time to time on various occasions.

reviews.review_heading: RMLAU review all about the internal and external.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very bad to live in. There is no facility for anything. The bathroom is in very bad condition, and the mess is totally not hygienic. Every time we get some type of insect in the food, avoid living in a hostel if you are coming here.

reviews.review_heading: There is no faculty and placement support. The infrastructure and some facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi or labs. Only classrooms and a library are available. The classrooms are decent. Sports and games facilities are good. There are no medical facilities or a canteen. Only offline education is provided, and the quality is good. However, the college needs to improve this course further.

reviews.review_heading: They should improve the placement for the students' good future.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good. The classrooms are the best in their college. The hostel facilities are not good for the students. In their college, they have organized sports and games on their campus. In the mess facilities, they have provided good-quality food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Meena Shah Institute of Technology and ManagementReviewed on 24 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: “Affordable college with supportive faculty, good placements, but strict rules and a small campus.”
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are the best in MSITM Degree College, Gonda. Huge labs, Wi-Fi, and classrooms are great. The library is available. There is no hostel in our college. The institute offers a wide set of facilities, including labs, a library, an auditorium, a cafeteria, a gym, medical facilities, and a sports complex.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sai Degree CollegeReviewed on 6 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Budget-friendly college with supportive faculty—best for government exam aspirants.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Sai Degree College is decent, considering it is an arts-focused government-affiliated institution. Classrooms are basic but spacious, and fans and lights are available in all rooms. The college has a small but functional library with useful books for B.A. students. However, there are no smart classrooms or Wi-Fi for students. There is a sports ground and some facilities for physical education students. Hostel facilities are not available inside the college, but private host...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Sri Vinayak MahavidyalayaReviewed on 20 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college is very good for studying, and all facilities are very good. I am fully satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are not available for boys, but Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries are good, and all facilities are very well maintained. The quality of facilities in my hostel is very good, and the mess and canteen are also well-maintained. Sports and game facilities are also available in my college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Government Medical College, KannaujReviewed on 4 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College, Kannauj.
reviews.review_text: The college is located 2 KM from Tirwaganj and 12 KM from Kannauj city. It is spread over 90 acres, and it consists of an academic block, an emergency department, OPDs of all departments, including a dental clinic. There are cancer and cardiology hospitals. It has a girls' hostel, a boys' hostel, a female intern hostel, a male intern hostel, a junior residents' hostel, a senior residents' hostel, a football ground, a volleyball court, a basketball court, an auditorium, and a multipurpose hall. T...

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good and has value for money. All facilities are available here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is very good, and the campus is also very good. All facilities are available in the lab, and the hostels are clean. All kinds of facilities are available in the college, such as a computer lab, a playground, a canteen, a gym, and other sports grounds like basketball and badminton courts.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Saraswati Dental CollegeReviewed on 29 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: An institution with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: One of the best aspects of the college was campus life. The infrastructure was modern and well-maintained, with spacious lecture theatres, well-equipped labs and clinics, a central library, clean hostels, and Wi-Fi facility. There was a small herbal garden named after the owner, with herbal and medicinal plants.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by KS Saket Post Graduate CollegeReviewed on 20 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members. Labs and Wi-Fi are good. A good library with good air quality and fans.
reviews.review_text: We were provided good Wi-Fi and the signal was also good. The labs were not so good but the classroom was good. The library was small but good. Here is no hostel for the college because all students live close to the college. Here is a big ground for playing sports and games.

college_info.college_name: RMLAU Scholarship Details

paragraphs: RMLAU fee varies course-wise. The total fee includes caution deposit, tuition fee, exam fee, etc. Below are RMLAU fee for top courses:
Note: The fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change. Hence, data might vary.

RMLAU BA fee is cumulative of multiple components, such as hostel fee, tuition fee, caution deposit, and more. The total tuition fees for the BA programmes range between INR 34,050 and INR 59,550. In addition, the hostel fee is INR 52,000. After final selection, students need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat. Further, it must be noted that the given fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

The fees for the M.Tech course at Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh University is very reasonable when compared to other universities. Actually there are four specialisation in M.Tech at Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Avadh University. The fees at this university for M.Tech is mentioned below
Specialization and Tuition Fees (INR)
M.Tech (Computer Science)  2 Years - 1.35 LPA
M.Tech (Electronics and Communication Engineering) 2 Years - 1.35 LPA
M.Tech (Information Technology)  2 Years - 1.35 LPA
M.Tech ( Mechanical Engineering) 2 Years  - 1.35 LPA

Yes, the students at the RMLAU are offered scholarships based on their merit and caste reservation. Students can apply for the scholarships offered by the state government as the same is accepted at the university. They can apply for meritorious scholarships offered based on the merit of candidates and to the student belonging to a reserved category.
